S.FORM: yona hungu' amutux kinramas taxan ka alihuṟ su'
S.PHON: jona ħuŋuʔ amutux kinramas~ɕ taxan ka aliħuɾ s~ɕuʔ
S.FORM: yona hungu' amutux kinramas taxan ka alihuṟ su'
S.PHON: jona ħuŋuʔ amutux kinramas~ɕ taxan ka aliħuɾ s~ɕuʔ
S.TRANSL: 你的翅膀就像彩虹一樣美麗。

S.FORM: umihul su' hahayak ci aṟingu' na ṟapak, mulaka'! lu mulaka'!
S.PHON: umiħul s~ɕuʔ ħaħajak ʦ~ʨi aɾiŋuʔ na ɾapak, mulakaʔ! lu mulakaʔ!
S.FORM: umihul su' hahayak ci aṟingu' na ṟapak, mulaka'! lu mulaka'!
S.PHON: umiħul s~ɕuʔ ħaħajak ʦ~ʨi aɾiŋuʔ na ɾapak, mulakaʔ! lu mulakaʔ!

S.FORM: hita' su' muṟaṟing mananang mukura' kaṟal bawi'.
S.PHON: ħitaʔ s~ɕuʔ muɾaɾiŋ mananaŋ mukuraʔ kaɾal βawiʔ.
S.FORM: hita' su' muṟaṟing mananang mukura' kaṟal bawi'.
S.PHON: ħitaʔ s~ɕuʔ muɾaɾiŋ mananaŋ mukuraʔ kaɾal βawiʔ.
S.TRANSL: 期待你更堅強勇敢的迎向天空。

S.FORM: kuṟing ga Bakan Nawi', mapusal matṟu' ingkaṟalan linpagan mu ci patas la. tehuk matṟu' buṟating ingkaṟalan hani, wal mu su'un lunpuw ka patas linpagan mu Amerika la. wal cu magal ci patas pincungus na masu' lunpuw cika linpagan mu hani' uṟi la. mamaha' cu mumaṟah galeng ni' hani ga, makmatox cu ci rararal, cacun mu cimu i mapitu' buṟating utux rex na malahngan matṟu wagi' ga, awah magluw matisal moṟow mu kora'. awah caṟung kay!
S.PHON: kuɾiŋ ɣa βakan nawiʔ, mapus~ɕal matɾuʔ iŋkaɾalan linpaɣan mu ʦ~ʨi patas~ɕ la. teħuk matɾuʔ βuɾatiŋ iŋkaɾalan ħani, wal mu s~ɕuʔun lunpuw ka patas~ɕ linpaɣan mu amerika la. wal ʦ~ʨu maɣal ʦ~ʨi patas~ɕ pinʦ~ʨuŋus~ɕ na mas~ɕuʔ lunpuw ʦ~ʨika linpaɣan mu ħaniʔ uɾi la. mamaħaʔ ʦ~ʨu mumaɾaħ ɣaleŋ niʔ ħani ɣa, makmatox ʦ~ʨu ʦ~ʨi rararal, ʦ~ʨaʦ~ʨun mu ʦ~ʨimu i mapituʔ βuɾatiŋ utux rex na malaħŋan matɾu waɣiʔ ɣa, awaħ maɣluw matis~ɕal moɾow mu koraʔ. awaħ ʦ~ʨaɾuŋ kaj!
S.FORM: kuṟing ga Bakan Nawi', mapusal matṟu' ingkaṟalan linpagan mu ci patas la. tehuk matṟu' buṟating ingkaṟalan hani, wal mu su'un lunpuw ka patas linpagan mu Amerika la. wal cu magal ci patas pincungus na masu' lunpuw cika linpagan mu hani' uṟi la. mamaha' cu mumaṟah galeng ni' hani ga, makmatox cu ci rararal, cacun mu cimu i mapitu' buṟating utux rex na malahngan matṟu wagi' ga, awah magluw matisal moṟow mu kora'. awah caṟung kay!
S.PHON: kuɾiŋ ɣa βakan nawiʔ, mapus~ɕal matɾuʔ iŋkaɾalan linpaɣan mu ʦ~ʨi patas~ɕ la. teħuk matɾuʔ βuɾatiŋ iŋkaɾalan ħani, wal mu s~ɕuʔun lunpuw ka patas~ɕ linpaɣan mu amerika la. wal ʦ~ʨu maɣal ʦ~ʨi patas~ɕ pinʦ~ʨuŋus~ɕ na mas~ɕuʔ lunpuw ʦ~ʨika linpaɣan mu ħaniʔ uɾi la. mamaħaʔ ʦ~ʨu mumaɾaħ ɣaleŋ niʔ ħani ɣa, makmatox ʦ~ʨu ʦ~ʨi rararal, ʦ~ʨaʦ~ʨun mu ʦ~ʨimu i mapituʔ βuɾatiŋ utux rex na malaħŋan matɾu waɣiʔ ɣa, awaħ maɣluw matis~ɕal moɾow mu koraʔ. awaħ ʦ~ʨaɾuŋ kaj!
S.TRANSL: 我是Bakan Nawi’，辛苦認真讀書已經二十六年了，好不容易今年六月已從美國修完課程，拿到博士學位，在進入職場之前，除了想見見久違的親友之外，也邀請親友在七月一日晚上六點半能到家裡聚一聚，一定要來喔！

S.FORM: ini' ta' ba'iy ye kanon ka pakelan na rex makaktox ta' lu makakaṟal ci ke' ta' nak, salahaw manapung ci insa' na kinnabkisan, lu mapatisal ci intana'an makaṟal ci sunkakaru' na inohan rali', palamoh cu caṟung ci a'awah mamu.
S.PHON: iniʔ taʔ βaʔij je kanon ka pakelan na rex makaktox taʔ lu makakaɾal ʦ~ʨi keʔ taʔ nak, s~ɕalaħaw manapuŋ ʦ~ʨi ins~ɕaʔ na kinnaβkis~ɕan, lu mapatis~ɕal ʦ~ʨi intanaʔan makaɾal ʦ~ʨi s~ɕunkakaruʔ na inoħan raliʔ, palamoħ ʦ~ʨu ʦ~ʨaɾuŋ ʦ~ʨi aʔawaħ mamu.
S.FORM: ini' ta' ba'iy ye kanon ka pakelan na rex makaktox ta' lu makakaṟal ci ke' ta' nak, salahaw manapung ci insa' na kinnabkisan, lu mapatisal ci intana'an makaṟal ci sunkakaru' na inohan rali', palamoh cu caṟung ci a'awah mamu.
S.PHON: iniʔ taʔ βaʔij je kanon ka pakelan na rex makaktox taʔ lu makakaɾal ʦ~ʨi keʔ taʔ nak, s~ɕalaħaw manapuŋ ʦ~ʨi ins~ɕaʔ na kinnaβkis~ɕan, lu mapatis~ɕal ʦ~ʨi intanaʔan makaɾal ʦ~ʨi s~ɕunkakaruʔ na inoħan raliʔ, palamoħ ʦ~ʨu ʦ~ʨaɾuŋ ʦ~ʨi aʔawaħ mamu.
S.TRANSL: 不知道何時能再有機會和大家說說Plngwan的話，聽聽耆老的傳說故事，和同學聊小時候的笑話，我真的很期待你們的到來。

S.FORM: kanon ka maṟumul lu pascex caṟung ka buṟating?
S.PHON: kanon ka maɾumul lu pas~ɕʦ~ʨex ʦ~ʨaɾuŋ ka βuɾatiŋ?
S.FORM: kanon ka maṟumul lu pascex caṟung ka buṟating?
S.PHON: kanon ka maɾumul lu pas~ɕʦ~ʨex ʦ~ʨaɾuŋ ka βuɾatiŋ?

S.FORM: maspat buṟating malapṟow ṟamagal rex maṟumul lu pascex caṟung ka buṟating.
S.PHON: mas~ɕpat βuɾatiŋ malapɾow ɾamaɣal rex maɾumul lu pas~ɕʦ~ʨex ʦ~ʨaɾuŋ ka βuɾatiŋ.
S.FORM: maspat buṟating malapṟow ṟamagal rex maṟumul lu pascex caṟung ka buṟating.
S.PHON: mas~ɕpat βuɾatiŋ malapɾow ɾamaɣal rex maɾumul lu pas~ɕʦ~ʨex ʦ~ʨaɾuŋ ka βuɾatiŋ.
S.TRANSL: 每年的八月十五日月亮最圓、最亮。

S.FORM: buse' ini' pakakatox ka utux moṟow la, rex hani, maras ci bininiy ka ci'uli' nahaṟi' musa' moṟow.
S.PHON: βus~ɕeʔ iniʔ pakakatox ka utux moɾow la, rex ħani, maras~ɕ ʦ~ʨi βininij ka ʦ~ʨiʔuliʔ naħaɾiʔ mus~ɕaʔ moɾow.
S.FORM: buse' ini' pakakatox ka utux moṟow la, rex hani, maras ci bininiy ka ci'uli' nahaṟi' musa' moṟow.
S.PHON: βus~ɕeʔ iniʔ pakakatox ka utux moɾow la, rex ħani, maras~ɕ ʦ~ʨi βininij ka ʦ~ʨiʔuliʔ naħaɾiʔ mus~ɕaʔ moɾow.
S.TRANSL: 這一天，久久沒見面的一家人，帶著禮物趕著回家，

S.FORM: maṟuk cika kakaṟuk na wagi' ka wagi', minakung la.
S.PHON: maɾuk ʦ~ʨika kakaɾuk na waɣiʔ ka waɣiʔ, minakuŋ la.
S.FORM: maṟuk cika kakaṟuk na wagi' ka wagi', minakung la.
S.PHON: maɾuk ʦ~ʨika kakaɾuk na waɣiʔ ka waɣiʔ, minakuŋ la.

S.FORM: minoh cika a'awah na wagi' nel masinhayuw matata' ka buṟating.
S.PHON: minoħ ʦ~ʨika aʔawaħ na waɣiʔ nel mas~ɕinħajuw matataʔ ka βuɾatiŋ.
S.FORM: minoh cika a'awah na wagi' nel masinhayuw matata' ka buṟating.
S.PHON: minoħ ʦ~ʨika aʔawaħ na waɣiʔ nel mas~ɕinħajuw matataʔ ka βuɾatiŋ.

S.FORM: cex na buṟating, bale' cumex raṟes na ututux moṟow min.
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨex na βuɾatiŋ, βaleʔ ʦ~ʨumex raɾes~ɕ na ututux moɾow min.
S.FORM: cex na buṟating, bale' cumex raṟes na ututux moṟow min.
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨex na βuɾatiŋ, βaleʔ ʦ~ʨumex raɾes~ɕ na ututux moɾow min.
S.TRANSL: 它的亮光，照在我們每一個家人的臉上，

S.FORM: ma'a'as kora' utux moṟow, umabas ka raṟes ni' yaya' hiya', maku' pascex lu maṟumul ka sase' na raṟes ni'.
S.PHON: maʔaʔas~ɕ koraʔ utux moɾow, umaβas~ɕ ka raɾes~ɕ niʔ jajaʔ ħijaʔ, makuʔ pas~ɕʦ~ʨex lu maɾumul ka s~ɕas~ɕeʔ na raɾes~ɕ niʔ.
S.FORM: ma'a'as kora' utux moṟow, umabas ka raṟes ni' yaya' hiya', maku' pascex lu maṟumul ka sase' na raṟes ni'.
S.PHON: maʔaʔas~ɕ koraʔ utux moɾow, umaβas~ɕ ka raɾes~ɕ niʔ jajaʔ ħijaʔ, makuʔ pas~ɕʦ~ʨex lu maɾumul ka s~ɕas~ɕeʔ na raɾes~ɕ niʔ.
S.TRANSL: 充滿著歡欣，尤其那一個慈祥的媽媽， 臉上笑得又圓又亮。

S.FORM: cel mupatahuk ci raramat utux nane'an ka Ahwanti. utux rex, utux tepeh ka aṟingu' na asinuw tinahuk ni'. tehuk ka tugal ci'uli' moh mani' ci mami' ki', masina' ci utux ṟating aṟingu' na asinuw kora' naha'.
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨel mupataħuk ʦ~ʨi raramat utux naneʔan ka aħwanti. utux rex, utux tepeħ ka aɾiŋuʔ na as~ɕinuw tinaħuk niʔ. teħuk ka tuɣal ʦ~ʨiʔuliʔ moħ maniʔ ʦ~ʨi mamiʔ kiʔ, mas~ɕinaʔ ʦ~ʨi utux ɾatiŋ aɾiŋuʔ na as~ɕinuw koraʔ naħaʔ.
S.FORM: cel mupatahuk ci raramat utux nane'an ka Ahwanti. utux rex, utux tepeh ka aṟingu' na asinuw tinahuk ni'. tehuk ka tugal ci'uli' moh mani' ci mami' ki', masina' ci utux ṟating aṟingu' na asinuw kora' naha'.
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨel mupataħuk ʦ~ʨi raramat utux naneʔan ka aħwanti. utux rex, utux tepeħ ka aɾiŋuʔ na as~ɕinuw tinaħuk niʔ. teħuk ka tuɣal ʦ~ʨiʔuliʔ moħ maniʔ ʦ~ʨi mamiʔ kiʔ, mas~ɕinaʔ ʦ~ʨi utux ɾatiŋ aɾiŋuʔ na as~ɕinuw koraʔ naħaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 阿凡提在一家餐館當廚師，一天，他燒了一鍋肉湯。三位顧客前來吃飯，每人要了一碗肉湯。

S.FORM: ini' kabuse' kinane'an, moka caha' naha' ga malawa' ci ka Ahwanti kaṟalun ni' "mupatahuk, ini' sa'a'amol ka aṟingu' hani, puse tikiy ci timu' na!" ini' kamasu' kumaṟal naga, cumik kumaṟal tutux naha' luṟi "bilak caṟung ka inuw uṟi, tongi' tikiy ci inuw! ma" nah na masu' kumaṟal ga, matatuli' ka tagitugal na ci'uli' luṟi, kumaṟal "bilak caṟung ka urik uṟi, puse tikiy ci urik!"
S.PHON: iniʔ kaβus~ɕeʔ kinaneʔan, moka ʦ~ʨaħaʔ naħaʔ ɣa malawaʔ ʦ~ʨi ka aħwanti kaɾalun niʔ "mupataħuk, iniʔ s~ɕaʔaʔamol ka aɾiŋuʔ ħani, pus~ɕe tikij ʦ~ʨi timuʔ na!" iniʔ kamas~ɕuʔ kumaɾal naɣa, ʦ~ʨumik kumaɾal tutux naħaʔ luɾi "βilak ʦ~ʨaɾuŋ ka inuw uɾi, toŋiʔ tikij ʦ~ʨi inuw! ma" naħ na mas~ɕuʔ kumaɾal ɣa, matatuliʔ ka taɣituɣal na ʦ~ʨiʔuliʔ luɾi, kumaɾal "βilak ʦ~ʨaɾuŋ ka urik uɾi, pus~ɕe tikij ʦ~ʨi urik!"
S.FORM: ini' kabuse' kinane'an, moka caha' naha' ga malawa' ci ka Ahwanti kaṟalun ni' "mupatahuk, ini' sa'a'amol ka aṟingu' hani, puse tikiy ci timu' na!" ini' kamasu' kumaṟal naga, cumik kumaṟal tutux naha' luṟi "bilak caṟung ka inuw uṟi, tongi' tikiy ci inuw! ma" nah na masu' kumaṟal ga, matatuli' ka tagitugal na ci'uli' luṟi, kumaṟal "bilak caṟung ka urik uṟi, puse tikiy ci urik!"
S.PHON: iniʔ kaβus~ɕeʔ kinaneʔan, moka ʦ~ʨaħaʔ naħaʔ ɣa malawaʔ ʦ~ʨi ka aħwanti kaɾalun niʔ "mupataħuk, iniʔ s~ɕaʔaʔamol ka aɾiŋuʔ ħani, pus~ɕe tikij ʦ~ʨi timuʔ na!" iniʔ kamas~ɕuʔ kumaɾal naɣa, ʦ~ʨumik kumaɾal tutux naħaʔ luɾi "βilak ʦ~ʨaɾuŋ ka inuw uɾi, toŋiʔ tikij ʦ~ʨi inuw! ma" naħ na mas~ɕuʔ kumaɾal ɣa, matatuliʔ ka taɣituɣal na ʦ~ʨiʔuliʔ luɾi, kumaɾal "βilak ʦ~ʨaɾuŋ ka urik uɾi, pus~ɕe tikij ʦ~ʨi urik!"
S.TRANSL: 剛吃不久，其中一位便把阿凡提叫出來嚷道：＂廚師，湯太淡了，給放點鹽！＂他還沒說完，另一個便說：＂蔥太少了， 給我加一點蔥！＂他剛說完，第三個人又站了起來，說：＂辣椒太少了，給我放一點辣椒！＂

S.FORM: matox lu matox cika aṟingu' na asinuw naha' ka Ahwanti, tumalang ma'abu' utux-ngawa', kumaṟal ka hiya' "bilak caṟung ka asinuw uṟi, ki tongan tikiy ci asinuw luṟi ong ma."
S.PHON: matox lu matox ʦ~ʨika aɾiŋuʔ na as~ɕinuw naħaʔ ka aħwanti, tumalaŋ maʔaβuʔ utux-ŋawaʔ, kumaɾal ka ħijaʔ "βilak ʦ~ʨaɾuŋ ka as~ɕinuw uɾi, ki toŋan tikij ʦ~ʨi as~ɕinuw luɾi oŋ ma."
S.FORM: matox lu matox cika aṟingu' na asinuw naha' ka Ahwanti, tumalang ma'abu' utuxngawa', kumaṟal ka hiya' "bilak caṟung ka asinuw uṟi, ki tongan tikiy ci asinuw luṟi ong ma."
S.PHON: matox lu matox ʦ~ʨika aɾiŋuʔ na as~ɕinuw naħaʔ ka aħwanti, tumalaŋ maʔaβuʔ utux-ŋawaʔ, kumaɾal ka ħijaʔ "βilak ʦ~ʨaɾuŋ ka as~ɕinuw uɾi, ki toŋan tikij ʦ~ʨi as~ɕinuw luɾi oŋ ma."
S.TRANSL: 阿凡提看了看他們的肉湯，嘗了一口，說道：＂肉也太少了，應該再加一點肉。＂

S.FORM: masputing sani' ka sinbaba'an mu ci patas na itaṟal la! …nah cu na sunbaba' matas ci ji! pasaring micuw ungat mu sababa'an ka ke' na itaṟal la! tehuk sani' ka ke' na itaṟal la!
S.PHON: mas~ɕputiŋ s~ɕaniʔ ka s~ɕinβaβaʔan mu ʦ~ʨi patas~ɕ na itaɾal la! *naħ ʦ~ʨu na s~ɕunβaβaʔ matas~ɕ ʦ~ʨi ji! pas~ɕariŋ miʦ~ʨuw uŋat mu s~ɕaβaβaʔan ka keʔ na itaɾal la! teħuk s~ɕaniʔ ka keʔ na itaɾal la!
S.FORM: masputing sani' ka sinbaba'an mu ci patas na itaṟal la! …nah cu na sunbaba' matas ci ji! pasaring micuw ungat mu sababa'an ka ke' na itaṟal la! tehuk sani' ka ke' na itaṟal la!
S.PHON: mas~ɕputiŋ s~ɕaniʔ ka s~ɕinβaβaʔan mu ʦ~ʨi patas~ɕ na itaɾal la! *naħ ʦ~ʨu na s~ɕunβaβaʔ matas~ɕ ʦ~ʨi ji! pas~ɕariŋ miʦ~ʨuw uŋat mu s~ɕaβaβaʔan ka keʔ na itaɾal la! teħuk s~ɕaniʔ ka keʔ na itaɾal la!
S.TRANSL: 我的最後一堂泰雅語課！…我只是剛剛學會寫字！今後永遠也學不到泰雅語！泰雅語就到此為止了！

S.FORM: talagay ka rex wal mu huriun, masang cu nak caṟung ci insa' mu! ini' cu sababale' lunpuw, ungkuri' cu magiy linpagan musa' cu malahang ci ubu' na kabahni', musa' cu salahaw ci use' luling. moka papatas mu haca, patas na itaṟal mu.
S.PHON: talaɣaj ka rex wal mu ħuriun, mas~ɕaŋ ʦ~ʨu nak ʦ~ʨaɾuŋ ʦ~ʨi ins~ɕaʔ mu! iniʔ ʦ~ʨu s~ɕaβaβaleʔ lunpuw, uŋkuriʔ ʦ~ʨu maɣij linpaɣan mus~ɕaʔ ʦ~ʨu malaħaŋ ʦ~ʨi uβuʔ na kaβaħniʔ, mus~ɕaʔ ʦ~ʨu s~ɕalaħaw ʦ~ʨi us~ɕeʔ luliŋ. moka papatas~ɕ mu ħaʦ~ʨa, patas~ɕ na itaɾal mu.
S.FORM: talagay ka rex wal mu huriun, masang cu nak caṟung ci insa' mu! ini' cu sababale' lunpuw, ungkuri' cu magiy linpagan musa' cu malahang ci ubu' na kabahni', musa' cu salahaw ci use' luling. moka papatas mu haca, patas na itaṟal mu.
S.PHON: talaɣaj ka rex wal mu ħuriun, mas~ɕaŋ ʦ~ʨu nak ʦ~ʨaɾuŋ ʦ~ʨi ins~ɕaʔ mu! iniʔ ʦ~ʨu s~ɕaβaβaleʔ lunpuw, uŋkuriʔ ʦ~ʨu maɣij linpaɣan mus~ɕaʔ ʦ~ʨu malaħaŋ ʦ~ʨi uβuʔ na kaβaħniʔ, mus~ɕaʔ ʦ~ʨu s~ɕalaħaw ʦ~ʨi us~ɕeʔ luliŋ. moka papatas~ɕ mu ħaʦ~ʨa, patas~ɕ na itaɾal mu.
S.TRANSL: 我現在是多麼悔恨自己蹉跎光陰啊！悔恨自己從前蹺課去掏鳥窩，去河邊戲水！

S.FORM: patas lumuhing ci insa' na kinnabkisan, yona ṟaṟuw caṟung sipanga' ci micuw hang, aṟusuw uṟi. micuw laga yona rangi' kinlalayan la, ini' cu pakmasugagiy hiyan. moka Baay uṟi. lunlungun mu pagiy ka hiya' la, aṟat mu tataxan karirex la, wal mu ṟungen kora' ka sa'ang lu binaxiy ni' kinang rali' la.
S.PHON: patas~ɕ lumuħiŋ ʦ~ʨi ins~ɕaʔ na kinnaβkis~ɕan, jona ɾaɾuw ʦ~ʨaɾuŋ s~ɕipaŋaʔ ʦ~ʨi miʦ~ʨuw ħaŋ, aɾus~ɕuw uɾi. miʦ~ʨuw laɣa jona raŋiʔ kinlalajan la, iniʔ ʦ~ʨu pakmas~ɕuɣaɣij ħijan. moka βaaj uɾi. lunluŋun mu paɣij ka ħijaʔ la, aɾat mu tataxan karirex la, wal mu ɾuŋen koraʔ ka s~ɕaʔaŋ lu βinaxij niʔ kinaŋ raliʔ la.
S.FORM: patas lumuhing ci insa' na kinnabkisan, yona ṟaṟuw caṟung sipanga' ci micuw hang, aṟusuw uṟi. micuw laga yona rangi' kinlalayan la, ini' cu pakmasugagiy hiyan. moka Baay uṟi. lunlungun mu pagiy ka hiya' la, aṟat mu tataxan karirex la, wal mu ṟungen kora' ka sa'ang lu binaxiy ni' kinang rali' la.
S.PHON: patas~ɕ lumuħiŋ ʦ~ʨi ins~ɕaʔ na kinnaβkis~ɕan, jona ɾaɾuw ʦ~ʨaɾuŋ s~ɕipaŋaʔ ʦ~ʨi miʦ~ʨuw ħaŋ, aɾus~ɕuw uɾi. miʦ~ʨuw laɣa jona raŋiʔ kinlalajan la, iniʔ ʦ~ʨu pakmas~ɕuɣaɣij ħijan. moka βaaj uɾi. lunluŋun mu paɣij ka ħijaʔ la, aɾat mu tataxan karirex la, wal mu ɾuŋen koraʔ ka s~ɕaʔaŋ lu βinaxij niʔ kinaŋ raliʔ la.
S.TRANSL: 我的那些書，我的泰雅語課本，我的神聖的歷史書，之前背在身上還覺得那麼討厭，那麼沉重，現在卻像老朋友一樣，讓我難捨難分。還有Baay先生。一想到他就要走了，再也見不到了，我就忘記了以前的處懲和挨打。

S.FORM: ule' cu ci kaca, tehuk maspapaw na abagan laga, musa' kumut ci sasa'ing aṟat ga tugal puing totah ka yaba' la. rasun ni ka totah ga bali'un ni' sunlangu' ci riliyuw ka totah. bale' paslahbun lu ma'as ka linlungan min, yaka rarasun mini' kunṟak ci pacus ni' yaba'.
S.PHON: uleʔ ʦ~ʨu ʦ~ʨi kaʦ~ʨa, teħuk mas~ɕpapaw na aβaɣan laɣa, mus~ɕaʔ kumut ʦ~ʨi s~ɕas~ɕaʔiŋ aɾat ɣa tuɣal puiŋ totaħ ka jaβaʔ la. ras~ɕun ni ka totaħ ɣa βaliʔun niʔ s~ɕunlaŋuʔ ʦ~ʨi rilijuw ka totaħ. βaleʔ pas~ɕlaħβun lu maʔas~ɕ ka linluŋan min, jaka raras~ɕun miniʔ kunɾak ʦ~ʨi paʦ~ʨus~ɕ niʔ jaβaʔ.
S.FORM: ule' cu ci kaca, tehuk maspapaw na abagan laga, musa' kumut ci sasa'ing aṟat ga tugal puing totah ka yaba' la. rasun ni ka totah ga bali'un ni' sunlangu' ci riliyuw ka totah. bale' paslahbun lu ma'as ka linlungan min, yaka rarasun mini' kunṟak ci pacus ni' yaba'.
S.PHON: uleʔ ʦ~ʨu ʦ~ʨi kaʦ~ʨa, teħuk mas~ɕpapaw na aβaɣan laɣa, mus~ɕaʔ kumut ʦ~ʨi s~ɕas~ɕaʔiŋ aɾat ɣa tuɣal puiŋ totaħ ka jaβaʔ la. ras~ɕun ni ka totaħ ɣa βaliʔun niʔ s~ɕunlaŋuʔ ʦ~ʨi rilijuw ka totaħ. βaleʔ pas~ɕlaħβun lu maʔas~ɕ ka linluŋan min, jaka raras~ɕun miniʔ kunɾak ʦ~ʨi paʦ~ʨus~ɕ niʔ jaβaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 記得小時候，一到夏天的黃昏，爸爸就到竹園裡砍2、3根竹子，拿回來時先把竹子的最末端削的尖尖的，這個時候我們就會帶著興奮和緊張的心，因為爸爸要帶我們去捉蟋蟀，

S.FORM: utux nak ka pacus hiya'. bale' panutux kumehul ci baling mumaṟah ṟik, tehuk malahngan haṟi' laga, maki' cika kakaṟupan na baling cik! cik! cik! malawa'. magal ci totah linhaw ka yaba' bali'un mini' panutux mi' "usa'" sun mini'. panutux ci totah ka macsuse' min, mukura' min cika mumaṟah tumalang. makakatox minak ci insa', taxan ka baling na pacus ga kapahṟagan cuncu' ka baling na pacus, mastaṟil ka pacus laga, pare'an min la.
S.PHON: utux nak ka paʦ~ʨus~ɕ ħijaʔ. βaleʔ panutux kumeħul ʦ~ʨi βaliŋ mumaɾaħ ɾik, teħuk malaħŋan ħaɾiʔ laɣa, makiʔ ʦ~ʨika kakaɾupan na βaliŋ ʦ~ʨik! ʦ~ʨik! ʦ~ʨik! malawaʔ. maɣal ʦ~ʨi totaħ linħaw ka jaβaʔ βaliʔun miniʔ panutux miʔ "us~ɕaʔ" s~ɕun miniʔ. panutux ʦ~ʨi totaħ ka maʦ~ʨs~ɕus~ɕeʔ min, mukuraʔ min ʦ~ʨika mumaɾaħ tumalaŋ. makakatox minak ʦ~ʨi ins~ɕaʔ, taxan ka βaliŋ na paʦ~ʨus~ɕ ɣa kapaħɾaɣan ʦ~ʨunʦ~ʨuʔ ka βaliŋ na paʦ~ʨus~ɕ, mas~ɕtaɾil ka paʦ~ʨus~ɕ laɣa, pareʔan min la.
S.FORM: utux nak ka pacus hiya'. bale' panutux kumehul ci baling mumaṟah ṟik, tehuk malahngan haṟi' laga, maki' cika kakaṟupan na baling cik! cik! cik! malawa'. magal ci totah linhaw ka yaba' bali'un mini' panutux mi' "usa'" sun mini'. panutux ci totah ka macsuse' min, mukura' min cika mumaṟah tumalang. makakatox minak ci insa', taxan ka baling na pacus ga kapahṟagan cuncu' ka baling na pacus, mastaṟil ka pacus laga, pare'an min la.
S.PHON: utux nak ka paʦ~ʨus~ɕ ħijaʔ. βaleʔ panutux kumeħul ʦ~ʨi βaliŋ mumaɾaħ ɾik, teħuk malaħŋan ħaɾiʔ laɣa, makiʔ ʦ~ʨika kakaɾupan na βaliŋ ʦ~ʨik! ʦ~ʨik! ʦ~ʨik! malawaʔ. maɣal ʦ~ʨi totaħ linħaw ka jaβaʔ βaliʔun miniʔ panutux miʔ "us~ɕaʔ" s~ɕun miniʔ. panutux ʦ~ʨi totaħ ka maʦ~ʨs~ɕus~ɕeʔ min, mukuraʔ min ʦ~ʨika mumaɾaħ tumalaŋ. makakatox minak ʦ~ʨi ins~ɕaʔ, taxan ka βaliŋ na paʦ~ʨus~ɕ ɣa kapaħɾaɣan ʦ~ʨunʦ~ʨuʔ ka βaliŋ na paʦ~ʨus~ɕ, mas~ɕtaɾil ka paʦ~ʨus~ɕ laɣa, pareʔan min la.
S.TRANSL: 蟋蟀有一個習性，牠們會在田裡各自挖 一個個的小洞，到了傍晚就會到洞口吱！吱！吱！的叫，爸爸把削了尖尖的竹子給我們，跟我們說＂ usa’(去吧) ＂兄弟姐妹就各自拿爸爸削好的竹子跑到田裡，各憑本事就在蟋蟀的洞口拿起竹子使勁的把洞給堵住，蟋蟀就會跳起來，

S.FORM: kani' laga utux utux kaṟapun ka pacus la, ci kaca ga ma'as caṟung. ana' kito' kinbuse' kunṟak lu pari', ini' bah maha' mawit ka hi'. muṟaṟing ma'as na. pacus kinṟak min ga bali'un lunhuw amuṟuw na kaman, rasun nasali' sipa'axiy yayan, inaxiy laga sipakani' mini'.
S.PHON: kaniʔ laɣa utux utux kaɾapun ka paʦ~ʨus~ɕ la, ʦ~ʨi kaʦ~ʨa ɣa maʔas~ɕ ʦ~ʨaɾuŋ. anaʔ kitoʔ kinβus~ɕeʔ kunɾak lu pariʔ, iniʔ βaħ maħaʔ mawit ka ħiʔ. muɾaɾiŋ maʔas~ɕ na. paʦ~ʨus~ɕ kinɾak min ɣa βaliʔun lunħuw amuɾuw na kaman, ras~ɕun nas~ɕaliʔ s~ɕipaʔaxij jajan, inaxij laɣa s~ɕipakaniʔ miniʔ.
S.FORM: kani' laga utux utux kaṟapun ka pacus la, ci kaca ga ma'as caṟung. ana' kito' kinbuse' kunṟak lu pari', ini' bah maha' mawit ka hi'. muṟaṟing ma'as na. pacus kinṟak min ga bali'un lunhuw amuṟuw na kaman, rasun nasali' sipa'axiy yayan, inaxiy laga sipakani' mini'.
S.PHON: kaniʔ laɣa utux utux kaɾapun ka paʦ~ʨus~ɕ la, ʦ~ʨi kaʦ~ʨa ɣa maʔas~ɕ ʦ~ʨaɾuŋ. anaʔ kitoʔ kinβus~ɕeʔ kunɾak lu pariʔ, iniʔ βaħ maħaʔ mawit ka ħiʔ. muɾaɾiŋ maʔas~ɕ na. paʦ~ʨus~ɕ kinɾak min ɣa βaliʔun lunħuw amuɾuw na kaman, ras~ɕun nas~ɕaliʔ s~ɕipaʔaxij jajan, inaxij laɣa s~ɕipakaniʔ miniʔ.
S.TRANSL: 我們就會追啊追的，就這樣一隻隻的蟋蟀就手到擒來，那時覺得非常快樂，不管捉多久、追多遠都不會覺得累，還樂此不疲，捉到的蟋 蟀就用草梗把牠們串成一串帶回去工寮交給媽媽拿去烤，烤好後拿給我們吃。

S.FORM: rali' ga ṟaṟihung haṟi' ka kinnuxan hang, yonaka cami' ule' paki' nanahi' ga ba' nak ci a'usa' kora'. yaya' yaba' uṟi ga, sipasba' naha' ci ule' ka kinuba' na nabkis rali' lu kora' ka kakayanux maki' nanahi'. yonaka; rex yona inu' ga anak malahang ci buy na amol? amol ka kukuya' lu asinuw ka pakaṟek? ṟagu' amol ka anak ni'un? sunno' matox ka kaṟal? kora' hani… pinsaba' naha ka kunṟak ci pacus uṟi, lunlungun mu micuw ga, nel as aki' tunux mu ka sun kunṟak ci pacus i ule' cu cikaca.
S.PHON: raliʔ ɣa ɾaɾiħuŋ ħaɾiʔ ka kinnuxan ħaŋ, jonaka ʦ~ʨamiʔ uleʔ pakiʔ nanaħiʔ ɣa βaʔ nak ʦ~ʨi aʔus~ɕaʔ koraʔ. jajaʔ jaβaʔ uɾi ɣa, s~ɕipas~ɕβaʔ naħaʔ ʦ~ʨi uleʔ ka kinuβaʔ na naβkis~ɕ raliʔ lu koraʔ ka kakajanux makiʔ nanaħiʔ. jonaka; rex jona inuʔ ɣa anak malaħaŋ ʦ~ʨi βuj na amol? amol ka kukujaʔ lu as~ɕinuw ka pakaɾek? ɾaɣuʔ amol ka anak niʔun? s~ɕunnoʔ matox ka kaɾal? koraʔ ħani* pins~ɕaβaʔ naħa ka kunɾak ʦ~ʨi paʦ~ʨus~ɕ uɾi, lunluŋun mu miʦ~ʨuw ɣa, nel as~ɕ akiʔ tunux mu ka s~ɕun kunɾak ʦ~ʨi paʦ~ʨus~ɕ i uleʔ ʦ~ʨu ʦ~ʨikaʦ~ʨa.
S.FORM: rali' ga ṟaṟihung haṟi' ka kinnuxan hang, yonaka cami' ule' paki' nanahi' ga ba' nak ci a'usa' kora'. yaya' yaba' uṟi ga, sipasba' naha' ci ule' ka kinuba' na nabkis rali' lu kora' ka kakayanux maki' nanahi'. yonaka; rex yona inu' ga anak malahang ci buy na amol? amol ka kukuya' lu asinuw ka pakaṟek? ṟagu' amol ka anak ni'un? sunno' matox ka kaṟal? kora' hani… pinsaba' naha ka kunṟak ci pacus uṟi, lunlungun mu micuw ga, nel as aki' tunux mu ka sun kunṟak ci pacus i ule' cu cikaca.
S.PHON: raliʔ ɣa ɾaɾiħuŋ ħaɾiʔ ka kinnuxan ħaŋ, jonaka ʦ~ʨamiʔ uleʔ pakiʔ nanaħiʔ ɣa βaʔ nak ʦ~ʨi aʔus~ɕaʔ koraʔ. jajaʔ jaβaʔ uɾi ɣa, s~ɕipas~ɕβaʔ naħaʔ ʦ~ʨi uleʔ ka kinuβaʔ na naβkis~ɕ raliʔ lu koraʔ ka kakajanux makiʔ nanaħiʔ. jonaka; rex jona inuʔ ɣa anak malaħaŋ ʦ~ʨi βuj na amol? amol ka kukujaʔ lu as~ɕinuw ka pakaɾek? ɾaɣuʔ amol ka anak niʔun? s~ɕunnoʔ matox ka kaɾal? koraʔ ħani* pins~ɕaβaʔ naħa ka kunɾak ʦ~ʨi paʦ~ʨus~ɕ uɾi, lunluŋun mu miʦ~ʨuw ɣa, nel as~ɕ akiʔ tunux mu ka s~ɕun kunɾak ʦ~ʨi paʦ~ʨus~ɕ i uleʔ ʦ~ʨu ʦ~ʨikaʦ~ʨa.
S.TRANSL: 早期因為環境不是很好，我們這些山上的小孩幾乎都會自力更生，父母也把他們祖先所留傳下來的智慧及生存技巧告訴我們，例如：什麼樣的季節可以吃那種野果或會出現什麼昆蟲和動物，什麼野菜可以吃，怎麼觀看天象等等…，當然也包括了捉蟋蟀，如今回想起來，捉蟋蟀是我童年最美好的回憶。

S.FORM: matintanah ka abaw na ra' i pakabagan, yona rosi' masaṟux taxan; abagan ga magaṟagu' taxan ka ra', yona ringgo' palapoh; pakmuhla'iy ka ra', wal! wal! magasulu' la, yona kinbatunux na kanel; matanah ka ra' i muhla'iy la, yona yaya' sunhulhul ci linlungan na ule. ututux yumunaw ka rex ga ini' pintana' taxan ka ra'.
S.PHON: matintanaħ ka aβaw na raʔ i pakaβaɣan, jona ros~ɕiʔ mas~ɕaɾux taxan; aβaɣan ɣa maɣaɾaɣuʔ taxan ka raʔ, jona riŋɣoʔ palapoħ; pakmuħlaʔij ka raʔ, wal! wal! maɣas~ɕuluʔ la, jona kinβatunux na kanel; matanaħ ka raʔ i muħlaʔij la, jona jajaʔ s~ɕunħulħul ʦ~ʨi linluŋan na ule. ututux jumunaw ka rex ɣa iniʔ pintanaʔ taxan ka raʔ.
S.FORM: matintanah ka abaw na ra' i pakabagan, yona rosi' masaṟux taxan; abagan ga magaṟagu' taxan ka ra', yona ringgo' palapoh; pakmuhla'iy ka ra', wal! wal! magasulu' la, yona kinbatunux na kanel; matanah ka ra' i muhla'iy la, yona yaya' sunhulhul ci linlungan na ule. ututux yumunaw ka rex ga ini' pintana' taxan ka ra'.
S.PHON: matintanaħ ka aβaw na raʔ i pakaβaɣan, jona ros~ɕiʔ mas~ɕaɾux taxan; aβaɣan ɣa maɣaɾaɣuʔ taxan ka raʔ, jona riŋɣoʔ palapoħ; pakmuħlaʔij ka raʔ, wal! wal! maɣas~ɕuluʔ la, jona kinβatunux na kanel; matanaħ ka raʔ i muħlaʔij la, jona jajaʔ s~ɕunħulħul ʦ~ʨi linluŋan na ule. ututux jumunaw ka rex ɣa iniʔ pintanaʔ taxan ka raʔ.
S.TRANSL: 早春楓葉沫紅，像個害羞的少女；夏季楓林翠綠，像極了清脆的蘋果；秋天楓葉漸黃，猶如少婦風韻猶存；入冬楓紅層層，正像慈母溫暖了遊子心；每一個季節，都展現不同風情。

S.FORM: cel maki' ci ka alang Plngawan, habaṟaw ka seneng ini' kangungu' matabuk. rurugun na sinsi' gako', sunbale' tutux ci papumahun, Plngawan la ralu' ni'. sinsi' laha' ci sese'eneng, ba'un naha payux la arus lu ra' ka alang.
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨel makiʔ ʦ~ʨi ka alaŋ plŋawan, ħaβaɾaw ka s~ɕeneŋ iniʔ kaŋuŋuʔ mataβuk. ruruɣun na s~ɕins~ɕiʔ ɣakoʔ, s~ɕunβaleʔ tutux ʦ~ʨi papumaħun, plŋawan la raluʔ niʔ. s~ɕins~ɕiʔ laħaʔ ʦ~ʨi s~ɕes~ɕeʔeneŋ, βaʔun naħa pajux la arus~ɕ lu raʔ ka alaŋ.
S.FORM: cel maki' ci ka alang Plngawan, habaṟaw ka seneng ini' kangungu' matabuk. rurugun na sinsi' gako', sunbale' tutux ci papumahun, Plngawan la ralu' ni'. sinsi' laha' ci sese'eneng, ba'un naha payux la arus lu ra' ka alang.
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨel makiʔ ʦ~ʨi ka alaŋ plŋawan, ħaβaɾaw ka s~ɕeneŋ iniʔ kaŋuŋuʔ mataβuk. ruruɣun na s~ɕins~ɕiʔ ɣakoʔ, s~ɕunβaleʔ tutux ʦ~ʨi papumaħun, plŋawan la raluʔ niʔ. s~ɕins~ɕiʔ laħaʔ ʦ~ʨi s~ɕes~ɕeʔeneŋ, βaʔun naħa pajux la arus~ɕ lu raʔ ka alaŋ.
S.TRANSL: 南投縣仁愛鄉親愛村有著一群熱情、吃苦耐勞的青年人，在學校老師的支持和指導下，成立了Plngawan工作室，老師和青年人知道部落盛產楓樹和雲杉，

S.FORM: sable'an naha' ci byororing, pakagelan naha' ci patas na Itaṟal, moka tahaṟ na kahuni' ga, sisable' naha ci ukriri lu lubuw, sibi' naha alang lu gako'. gako' uṟi ga lanlamu' la papasba' ni. nabkis alang ga paslamoh ci kinramasan na insa' hani'. hita i babuw ingkaṟalan hani ka alang Plngawan ga, malubuw nak ci byororing sinbale' na yaya' yaba' naha ka ule' sani' ma.
S.PHON: s~ɕaβleʔan naħaʔ ʦ~ʨi βjororiŋ, pakaɣelan naħaʔ ʦ~ʨi patas~ɕ na itaɾal, moka taħaɾ na kaħuniʔ ɣa, s~ɕis~ɕaβleʔ naħa ʦ~ʨi ukriri lu luβuw, s~ɕiβiʔ naħa alaŋ lu ɣakoʔ. ɣakoʔ uɾi ɣa lanlamuʔ la papas~ɕβaʔ ni. naβkis~ɕ alaŋ ɣa pas~ɕlamoħ ʦ~ʨi kinramas~ɕan na ins~ɕaʔ ħaniʔ. ħita i βaβuw iŋkaɾalan ħani ka alaŋ plŋawan ɣa, maluβuw nak ʦ~ʨi βjororiŋ s~ɕinβaleʔ na jajaʔ jaβaʔ naħa ka uleʔ s~ɕaniʔ ma.
S.FORM: sable'an naha' ci byororing, pakagelan naha' ci patas na Itaṟal, moka tahaṟ na kahuni' ga, sisable' naha ci ukriri lu lubuw, sibi' naha alang lu gako'. gako' uṟi ga lanlamu' la papasba' ni. nabkis alang ga paslamoh ci kinramasan na insa' hani'. hita i babuw ingkaṟalan hani ka alang Plngawan ga, malubuw nak ci byororing sinbale' na yaya' yaba' naha ka ule' sani' ma.
S.PHON: s~ɕaβleʔan naħaʔ ʦ~ʨi βjororiŋ, pakaɣelan naħaʔ ʦ~ʨi patas~ɕ na itaɾal, moka taħaɾ na kaħuniʔ ɣa, s~ɕis~ɕaβleʔ naħa ʦ~ʨi ukriri lu luβuw, s~ɕiβiʔ naħa alaŋ lu ɣakoʔ. ɣakoʔ uɾi ɣa lanlamuʔ la papas~ɕβaʔ ni. naβkis~ɕ alaŋ ɣa pas~ɕlamoħ ʦ~ʨi kinramas~ɕan na ins~ɕaʔ ħaniʔ. ħita i βaβuw iŋkaɾalan ħani ka alaŋ plŋawan ɣa, maluβuw nak ʦ~ʨi βjororiŋ s~ɕinβaleʔ na jajaʔ jaβaʔ naħa ka uleʔ s~ɕaniʔ ma.
S.TRANSL: 試著用楓樹和雲杉製作小提琴，用泰雅的圖騰刻琴面，也用剩餘的材料，製作烏克麗麗和口簧琴，提供社區學校的學生來使用，學校落實藝術教育，地方的父老抱以很高的期待，希望未來幾年之後的親愛村，孩子能演奏自己父母親手製作的小提琴。

S.FORM: tanabirun mu ka Yaba' bawi' absuṟan taboki', hiya' ga tininu' ci kaṟal lu raxal, ungat ka ini' ni tehki mumaṟah tanabirun mu ka utux ki ule' na Yaba' bawi' Yesu kiristo' absuṟan mu. tanabirun mu ka Yesu pintasuw na Behuṟ Amutux, mastuw minoh mariya'an. waṟal patabuk aba' ni' Pntiyw pilato sipascamu' jyujika, mahu'il, ablun, mastuw ṟik na minakung, maktugal laga mayanux minoh inhilan, cikaca laga waṟal bawi' lu patatamon anali' ni' Yaba bawi' absuṟan kaṟal. babuw ni' unel luṟi ka hiya' lu panoh ki pasaṟit ci minhu'il lu mayanux. mu
S.PHON: tanaβirun mu ka jaβaʔ βawiʔ aβs~ɕuɾan taβokiʔ, ħijaʔ ɣa tininuʔ ʦ~ʨi kaɾal lu raxal, uŋat ka iniʔ ni teħki mumaɾaħ tanaβirun mu ka utux ki uleʔ na jaβaʔ βawiʔ jes~ɕu kiris~ɕtoʔ aβs~ɕuɾan mu. tanaβirun mu ka jes~ɕu pintas~ɕuw na βeħuɾ amutux, mas~ɕtuw minoħ marijaʔan. waɾal pataβuk aβaʔ niʔ pntijw pilato s~ɕipas~ɕʦ~ʨamuʔ jjujika, maħuʔil, aβlun, mas~ɕtuw ɾik na minakuŋ, maktuɣal laɣa majanux minoħ inħilan, ʦ~ʨikaʦ~ʨa laɣa waɾal βawiʔ lu patatamon analiʔ niʔ jaβa βawiʔ aβs~ɕuɾan kaɾal. βaβuw niʔ unel luɾi ka ħijaʔ lu panoħ ki pas~ɕaɾit ʦ~ʨi minħuʔil lu majanux. mu
S.FORM: tanabirun mu ka Yaba' bawi' absuṟan taboki', hiya' ga tininu' ci kaṟal lu raxal, ungat ka ini' ni tehki mumaṟah tanabirun mu ka utux ki ule' na Yaba' bawi' Yesu kiristo' absuṟan mu. tanabirun mu ka Yesu pintasuw na Behuṟ Amutux, mastuw minoh mariya'an. waṟal patabuk aba' ni' Pntiyw pilato sipascamu' jyujika, mahu'il, ablun, mastuw ṟik na minakung, maktugal laga mayanux minoh inhilan, cikaca laga waṟal bawi' lu patatamon anali' ni' Yaba bawi' absuṟan kaṟal. babuw ni' unel luṟi ka hiya' lu panoh ki pasaṟit ci minhu'il lu mayanux. mu

S.TRANSL: 我信上帝，全能的父，創造天地的主。我信我主耶穌基督，上帝的獨生子，因聖靈感孕，由童貞女馬利亞所生，在彼拉多手下受難，被釘於十字架、受死、埋葬：降在陰間，第三天從死人中復活，坐在全能父上帝的右邊，將來必從那裏降臨，審判活人死人。

S.FORM: tnabirun mu ka marahuw, tnabirun mu ka pasasilen paki' ututux alang. tnabirun muka pinsaba' ni magagaluk. tnabirun mu ka inalu' ni' Yaba' bawi' sumoṟal ci ṟukat. tnabirun mu ka aburuw na ci'uli mpakayanux minoh inhilan. tanabirun mu ka ini' pasputing kinanuxan. ameng

S.TRANSL: 我信聖靈，我信聖而公之教會，我信聖徒相通。我信罪得赦免，我信身體的復活，我信永生。阿們

S.TRANSL: 來自同一站的五位火車乘客，起站名叫做家，帶著不同的五雙腳，邁向不同的旅途。

S.FORM: tagi utux papak, masasu' mumaṟah, ini' sasangawa', taxan ka caṟung la insa', angṟat, ini' pasina', utux utux papak mukura' galeng.
S.PHON: taɣi utux papak, mas~ɕas~ɕuʔ mumaɾaħ, iniʔ s~ɕas~ɕaŋawaʔ, taxan ka ʦ~ʨaɾuŋ la ins~ɕaʔ, aŋɾat, iniʔ pas~ɕinaʔ, utux utux papak mukuraʔ ɣaleŋ.
S.FORM: tagi utux papak, masasu' mumaṟah, ini' sasangawa', taxan ka caṟung la insa', angṟat, ini' pasina', utux utux papak mukura' galeng.
S.PHON: taɣi utux papak, mas~ɕas~ɕuʔ mumaɾaħ, iniʔ s~ɕas~ɕaŋawaʔ, taxan ka ʦ~ʨaɾuŋ la ins~ɕaʔ, aŋɾat, iniʔ pas~ɕinaʔ, utux utux papak mukuraʔ ɣaleŋ.
S.TRANSL: 第一雙腳，默默耕耘，從不說話，只看到實在、認真、簡單、沒有需求，卻是一步一步的往前走。

S.FORM: tagi sa'ing papak, malilahaw, muabsuṟan, taxan ka cungus, kinuba', makakilux linlungan humuluy ci malapṟow papak mukura' galeng.
S.PHON: taɣi s~ɕaʔiŋ papak, malilaħaw, muaβs~ɕuɾan, taxan ka ʦ~ʨuŋus~ɕ, kinuβaʔ, makakilux linluŋan ħumuluj ʦ~ʨi malapɾow papak mukuraʔ ɣaleŋ.
S.FORM: tagi sa'ing papak, malilahaw, muabsuṟan, taxan ka cungus, kinuba', makakilux linlungan humuluy ci malapṟow papak mukura' galeng.
S.PHON: taɣi s~ɕaʔiŋ papak, malilaħaw, muaβs~ɕuɾan, taxan ka ʦ~ʨuŋus~ɕ, kinuβaʔ, makakilux linluŋan ħumuluj ʦ~ʨi malapɾow papak mukuraʔ ɣaleŋ.
S.TRANSL: 第二雙腳，熱情奔放，汲汲營營，可看到希望、知識、真情、滿腔熱血的拉著五雙腳往前衝。

S.FORM: tagi tugal papak, ma'as kinnuxan, masasu' mumaṟah, taxan ka ini' akas, linlungan, lumuking ci a'usa', masa'usa' maras ci papak ni.
S.PHON: taɣi tuɣal papak, maʔas~ɕ kinnuxan, mas~ɕas~ɕuʔ mumaɾaħ, taxan ka iniʔ akas~ɕ, linluŋan, lumukiŋ ʦ~ʨi aʔus~ɕaʔ, mas~ɕaʔus~ɕaʔ maras~ɕ ʦ~ʨi papak ni.
S.FORM: tagi tugal papak, ma'as kinnuxan, masasu' mumaṟah, taxan ka ini' akas, linlungan, lumuking ci a'usa', masa'usa' maras ci papak ni.
S.PHON: taɣi tuɣal papak, maʔas~ɕ kinnuxan, mas~ɕas~ɕuʔ mumaɾaħ, taxan ka iniʔ akas~ɕ, linluŋan, lumukiŋ ʦ~ʨi aʔus~ɕaʔ, mas~ɕaʔus~ɕaʔ maras~ɕ ʦ~ʨi papak ni.
S.TRANSL: 第三雙腳，樂之天命，按部就班，只看到無私、真心、負責、積極熱切的踩著自己的腳步。

S.FORM: tagi paṟat papak, ungat kakaṟalan, ini' tatama', taxan ka makinbuti', malala'ing, yona kelan lu ungat malahang ci a'usa'.
S.PHON: taɣi paɾat papak, uŋat kakaɾalan, iniʔ tatamaʔ, taxan ka makinβutiʔ, malalaʔiŋ, jona kelan lu uŋat malaħaŋ ʦ~ʨi aʔus~ɕaʔ.
S.FORM: tagi paṟat papak, ungat kakaṟalan, ini' tatama', taxan ka makinbuti', malala'ing, yona kelan lu ungat malahang ci a'usa'.
S.PHON: taɣi paɾat papak, uŋat kakaɾalan, iniʔ tatamaʔ, taxan ka makinβutiʔ, malalaʔiŋ, jona kelan lu uŋat malaħaŋ ʦ~ʨi aʔus~ɕaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 第四雙腳，放蕩不羈，漂浮不定，只看到率直、獨立、神秘、似有若無的找尋自己的堅定。

S.FORM: tagi ṟamagal papak, as kaṟal, ma'a'as, sababale', wal! wal! mulu' nak ci a'usa' na inohan, ini' pintana' ka cinragan, nanak makakaṟal ka pinkakuba'.
S.PHON: taɣi ɾamaɣal papak, as~ɕ kaɾal, maʔaʔas~ɕ, s~ɕaβaβaleʔ, wal! wal! muluʔ nak ʦ~ʨi aʔus~ɕaʔ na inoħan, iniʔ pintanaʔ ka ʦ~ʨinraɣan, nanak makakaɾal ka pinkakuβaʔ.
S.FORM: tagi ṟamagal papak, as kaṟal, ma'a'as, sababale', wal! wal! mulu' nak ci a'usa' na inohan, ini' pintana' ka cinragan, nanak makakaṟal ka pinkakuba'.
S.PHON: taɣi ɾamaɣal papak, as~ɕ kaɾal, maʔaʔas~ɕ, s~ɕaβaβaleʔ, wal! wal! muluʔ nak ʦ~ʨi aʔus~ɕaʔ na inoħan, iniʔ pintanaʔ ka ʦ~ʨinraɣan, nanak makakaɾal ka pinkakuβaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 第五雙腳，心直口快，簡單快樂，可看到天真，幸福、單純、漸漸找到自己的步伐。相同的血液，不同的旅途，相同的基因，不同的性格，唯一的交流是分享。

S.FORM: at parow, mangihuṟ kisli', mangilis, rumahya', as taxiy sunbale' tutux ci papuruyan. sumoṟal magluw, malapṟow papak giyona utux papak, tu'uy pasputingan ga "moṟow".
S.PHON: at parow, maŋiħuɾ kis~ɕliʔ, maŋilis~ɕ, rumaħjaʔ, as~ɕ taxij s~ɕunβaleʔ tutux ʦ~ʨi papurujan. s~ɕumoɾal maɣluw, malapɾow papak ɣijona utux papak, tuʔuj pas~ɕputiŋan ɣa "moɾow".
S.FORM: at parow, mangihuṟ kisli', mangilis, rumahya', as taxiy sunbale' tutux ci papuruyan. sumoṟal magluw, malapṟow papak giyona utux papak, tu'uy pasputingan ga "moṟow".
S.PHON: at parow, maŋiħuɾ kis~ɕliʔ, maŋilis~ɕ, rumaħjaʔ, as~ɕ taxij s~ɕunβaleʔ tutux ʦ~ʨi papurujan. s~ɕumoɾal maɣluw, malapɾow papak ɣijona utux papak, tuʔuj pas~ɕputiŋan ɣa "moɾow".
S.TRANSL: 中間有了想念、失落、生氣、徘徊、無助 、傷心、崩潰、無辜、勝利、成功、溫馨、真心，莫名地創造了同一個中心，盲目又甘願的在一起，五雙腳等於一雙腳，等於一條，最終的終點站還是＂家＂。

S.TRANSL: 採蜜的蜂兒，嗡！嗡！嗡，鳥兒也起得早

S.FORM: kisli' mu caṟung kora' ita' macsuse'; a'ihul laluhing kakaramas ci insa' na utux-nabkis ta'. aṟat ga pakakaṟal ta' ci a'usa na utux ingkaṟalan pasasilen ta', cumun cu caṟung cimunan, malahngan na malapṟow buṟating mapusal ṟamagal rex mapitu' wagi', paki' moṟow mu, tagisa'ing na pakaṟalan, pakaṟal ta' ci mamaha' ta' masasli' inu' lu amol ka a'usa' ta'. awah caṟung tehuk kora' mamu.
S.PHON: kis~ɕliʔ mu ʦ~ʨaɾuŋ koraʔ itaʔ maʦ~ʨs~ɕus~ɕeʔ; aʔiħul laluħiŋ kakaramas~ɕ ʦ~ʨi ins~ɕaʔ na utux-naβkis~ɕ taʔ. aɾat ɣa pakakaɾal taʔ ʦ~ʨi aʔus~ɕa na utux iŋkaɾalan pas~ɕas~ɕilen taʔ, ʦ~ʨumun ʦ~ʨu ʦ~ʨaɾuŋ ʦ~ʨimunan, malaħŋan na malapɾow βuɾatiŋ mapus~ɕal ɾamaɣal rex mapituʔ waɣiʔ, pakiʔ moɾow mu, taɣis~ɕaʔiŋ na pakaɾalan, pakaɾal taʔ ʦ~ʨi mamaħaʔ taʔ mas~ɕas~ɕliʔ inuʔ lu amol ka aʔus~ɕaʔ taʔ. awaħ ʦ~ʨaɾuŋ teħuk koraʔ mamu.
S.FORM: kisli' mu caṟung kora' ita' macsuse'; a'ihul laluhing kakaramas ci insa' na utuxnabkis ta'. aṟat ga pakakaṟal ta' ci a'usa na utux ingkaṟalan pasasilen ta', cumun cu caṟung cimunan, malahngan na malapṟow buṟating mapusal ṟamagal rex mapitu' wagi', paki' moṟow mu, tagisa'ing na pakaṟalan, pakaṟal ta' ci mamaha' ta' masasli' inu' lu amol ka a'usa' ta'. awah caṟung tehuk kora' mamu.
S.PHON: kis~ɕliʔ mu ʦ~ʨaɾuŋ koraʔ itaʔ maʦ~ʨs~ɕus~ɕeʔ; aʔiħul laluħiŋ kakaramas~ɕ ʦ~ʨi ins~ɕaʔ na utux-naβkis~ɕ taʔ. aɾat ɣa pakakaɾal taʔ ʦ~ʨi aʔus~ɕa na utux iŋkaɾalan pas~ɕas~ɕilen taʔ, ʦ~ʨumun ʦ~ʨu ʦ~ʨaɾuŋ ʦ~ʨimunan, malaħŋan na malapɾow βuɾatiŋ mapus~ɕal ɾamaɣal rex mapituʔ waɣiʔ, pakiʔ moɾow mu, taɣis~ɕaʔiŋ na pakaɾalan, pakaɾal taʔ ʦ~ʨi mamaħaʔ taʔ mas~ɕas~ɕliʔ inuʔ lu amol ka aʔus~ɕaʔ taʔ. awaħ ʦ~ʨaɾuŋ teħuk koraʔ mamu.
S.TRANSL: 最摯愛的表兄弟姐妹們：為了家族們和諧的關係，也為了我們在舉辦一年一度家族聚餐的活動內容更豐富更精采，在此邀請各位在十月二十五號晚上7：00整，在我家召開第二次的家族會議，並討論一年一度家族聚 餐的地點及活動內容，屆時請各位務必撥冗參加我們的會議。

S.FORM: "tana' la, iya' kaṟakeh kisli', iya' cangilis la." yonani kumaṟal ka apatuṟ, "rarogan misu'. minlu' mu galun ka king na boru' su' laga, amol la cacik su' mi' kinang?" "apatuṟ, ana amol ka pinsina' su' ini' hico', lukus mu, king mu, ana king nel tunux mu hani, babiy mu sinang kora'."
S.PHON: "tanaʔ la, ijaʔ kaɾakeħ kis~ɕliʔ, ijaʔ ʦ~ʨaŋilis~ɕ la." jonani kumaɾal ka apatuɾ, "raroɣan mis~ɕuʔ. minluʔ mu ɣalun ka kiŋ na βoruʔ s~ɕuʔ laɣa, amol la ʦ~ʨaʦ~ʨik s~ɕuʔ miʔ kinaŋ?" "apatuɾ, ana amol ka pins~ɕinaʔ s~ɕuʔ iniʔ ħiʦ~ʨoʔ, lukus~ɕ mu, kiŋ mu, ana kiŋ nel tunux mu ħani, βaβij mu s~ɕinaŋ koraʔ."
S.FORM: "tana' la, iya' kaṟakeh kisli', iya' cangilis la." yonani kumaṟal ka apatuṟ, "rarogan misu'. minlu' mu galun ka king na boru' su' laga, amol la cacik su' mi' kinang?" "apatuṟ, ana amol ka pinsina' su' ini' hico', lukus mu, king mu, ana king nel tunux mu hani, babiy mu sinang kora'."
S.PHON: "tanaʔ la, ijaʔ kaɾakeħ kis~ɕliʔ, ijaʔ ʦ~ʨaŋilis~ɕ la." jonani kumaɾal ka apatuɾ, "raroɣan mis~ɕuʔ. minluʔ mu ɣalun ka kiŋ na βoruʔ s~ɕuʔ laɣa, amol la ʦ~ʨaʦ~ʨik s~ɕuʔ miʔ kinaŋ?" "apatuɾ, ana amol ka pins~ɕinaʔ s~ɕuʔ iniʔ ħiʦ~ʨoʔ, lukus~ɕ mu, kiŋ mu, ana kiŋ nel tunux mu ħani, βaβij mu s~ɕinaŋ koraʔ."
S.TRANSL: ＂好啦，不要難過，別哭了，＂青蛙回答說，＂我有辦法幫助您。要是我幫您把您的金球撈出來，您拿什麼東西來回報我呢？＂＂親愛的青蛙，你要什麼東西都成呵，我的衣服、我的珍珠和寶石、甚至我頭上戴著的 這頂金冠，都可以給你。＂

S.FORM: masu' manapung ci ke' hani, kumaṟal ci kongcu ka apatuṟ; "lukus su', king su' kora' ka king su' tunux, ini' cu pakmagal ana utux, hoga minlu' saku' kisli' ga pasrangi' ta'. pagaluw ta' salahaw, pagaluw ta' mani' utux rakat. bing ta ci sara' sinbale' na king mani', abu' tana kopu' babawi' su', malahngan ga papabeliy cu a'abelan su'; minlu' su' suṟalun kora' hani laga, pakaṟuk cu use' ṟik, halan mu magal ka king na boru' su'."
S.PHON: mas~ɕuʔ manapuŋ ʦ~ʨi keʔ ħani, kumaɾal ʦ~ʨi koŋʦ~ʨu ka apatuɾ; "lukus~ɕ s~ɕuʔ, kiŋ s~ɕuʔ koraʔ ka kiŋ s~ɕuʔ tunux, iniʔ ʦ~ʨu pakmaɣal ana utux, ħoɣa minluʔ s~ɕakuʔ kis~ɕliʔ ɣa pas~ɕraŋiʔ taʔ. paɣaluw taʔ s~ɕalaħaw, paɣaluw taʔ maniʔ utux rakat. βiŋ ta ʦ~ʨi s~ɕaraʔ s~ɕinβaleʔ na kiŋ maniʔ, aβuʔ tana kopuʔ βaβawiʔ s~ɕuʔ, malaħŋan ɣa papaβelij ʦ~ʨu aʔaβelan s~ɕuʔ; minluʔ s~ɕuʔ s~ɕuɾalun koraʔ ħani laɣa, pakaɾuk ʦ~ʨu us~ɕeʔ ɾik, ħalan mu maɣal ka kiŋ na βoruʔ s~ɕuʔ."
S.FORM: masu' manapung ci ke' hani, kumaṟal ci kongcu ka apatuṟ; "lukus su', king su' kora' ka king su' tunux, ini' cu pakmagal ana utux, hoga minlu' saku' kisli' ga pasrangi' ta'. pagaluw ta' salahaw, pagaluw ta' mani' utux rakat. bing ta ci sara' sinbale' na king mani', abu' tana kopu' babawi' su', malahngan ga papabeliy cu a'abelan su'; minlu' su' suṟalun kora' hani laga, pakaṟuk cu use' ṟik, halan mu magal ka king na boru' su'."
S.PHON: mas~ɕuʔ manapuŋ ʦ~ʨi keʔ ħani, kumaɾal ʦ~ʨi koŋʦ~ʨu ka apatuɾ; "lukus~ɕ s~ɕuʔ, kiŋ s~ɕuʔ koraʔ ka kiŋ s~ɕuʔ tunux, iniʔ ʦ~ʨu pakmaɣal ana utux, ħoɣa minluʔ s~ɕakuʔ kis~ɕliʔ ɣa pas~ɕraŋiʔ taʔ. paɣaluw taʔ s~ɕalaħaw, paɣaluw taʔ maniʔ utux rakat. βiŋ ta ʦ~ʨi s~ɕaraʔ s~ɕinβaleʔ na kiŋ maniʔ, aβuʔ tana kopuʔ βaβawiʔ s~ɕuʔ, malaħŋan ɣa papaβelij ʦ~ʨu aʔaβelan s~ɕuʔ; minluʔ s~ɕuʔ s~ɕuɾalun koraʔ ħani laɣa, pakaɾuk ʦ~ʨu us~ɕeʔ ɾik, ħalan mu maɣal ka kiŋ na βoruʔ s~ɕuʔ."
S.TRANSL: 聽了這話，青蛙對小公主說：＂您的衣服、您的珍珠、您的寶石，還有您的金冠，我哪樣都不想要。不過，要是您喜歡我，讓我做您的好朋友，我們一起遊戲，吃飯的時候讓我和您同坐一張餐桌，用您的小金碟子吃東西，用您的小高腳杯飲酒，晚上還讓我睡在您的小床上；要是您答應所有這一切的話，我就潛到水潭裡去，把您的金球撈出來。＂

S.FORM: kumaṟal ka ci'uli' alax ci aguw la sun cu naha', kumaṟal ka kumaṟal, maha' haṟi' ṟamagal ingkaṟalan kumaṟal la, ga aṟat cu naha' intaxan masnukan na. yeka ini' cu pasnukan na ga rima' masnukan ka hiya' la. aṟat cu ka pa'alax ci aguw, nanu' micuw ini' cu alax. minalax cu rali' hang, hoga ini' katna' rumahya' na aguw ka hi' mu.
S.PHON: kumaɾal ka ʦ~ʨiʔuliʔ alax ʦ~ʨi aɣuw la s~ɕun ʦ~ʨu naħaʔ, kumaɾal ka kumaɾal, maħaʔ ħaɾiʔ ɾamaɣal iŋkaɾalan kumaɾal la, ɣa aɾat ʦ~ʨu naħaʔ intaxan mas~ɕnukan na. jeka iniʔ ʦ~ʨu pas~ɕnukan na ɣa rimaʔ mas~ɕnukan ka ħijaʔ la. aɾat ʦ~ʨu ka paʔalax ʦ~ʨi aɣuw, nanuʔ miʦ~ʨuw iniʔ ʦ~ʨu alax. minalax ʦ~ʨu raliʔ ħaŋ, ħoɣa iniʔ katnaʔ rumaħjaʔ na aɣuw ka ħiʔ mu.
S.FORM: kumaṟal ka ci'uli' alax ci aguw la sun cu naha', kumaṟal ka kumaṟal, maha' haṟi' ṟamagal ingkaṟalan kumaṟal la, ga aṟat cu naha' intaxan masnukan na. yeka ini' cu pasnukan na ga rima' masnukan ka hiya' la. aṟat cu ka pa'alax ci aguw, nanu' micuw ini' cu alax. minalax cu rali' hang, hoga ini' katna' rumahya' na aguw ka hi' mu.
S.PHON: kumaɾal ka ʦ~ʨiʔuliʔ alax ʦ~ʨi aɣuw la s~ɕun ʦ~ʨu naħaʔ, kumaɾal ka kumaɾal, maħaʔ ħaɾiʔ ɾamaɣal iŋkaɾalan kumaɾal la, ɣa aɾat ʦ~ʨu naħaʔ intaxan mas~ɕnukan na. jeka iniʔ ʦ~ʨu pas~ɕnukan na ɣa rimaʔ mas~ɕnukan ka ħijaʔ la. aɾat ʦ~ʨu ka paʔalax ʦ~ʨi aɣuw, nanuʔ miʦ~ʨuw iniʔ ʦ~ʨu alax. minalax ʦ~ʨu raliʔ ħaŋ, ħoɣa iniʔ katnaʔ rumaħjaʔ na aɣuw ka ħiʔ mu.
S.TRANSL: 別人勸我戒酒，勸規勸，但勸了五年誰也沒見我醉過，因為沒等我醉他就先醉倒了。我不是戒酒主義者，至少現在不是。以前曾經是的，後來因為體質弱，我沒能抵擋住酒力。

S.FORM: pasaring cu ba' lunlung nanu' cu matul ingkaṟalan galeng ni', ini' min haṟi pakakuba' ci mama' mu Watan. yeka, nel tunux mu ga, mama' (Watan) hiya' ga ini' laing ci ke' as usa' la ngawa' ni' lu masang caṟung uṟi. ye pasaring kanon ini' mu ba'iy, wal min yona masule' ci mama' la. sunkisli' caṟung ci insa' na Itaṟal ka mama' mu. yona kelan tutux na ci'uli' yuyuk paki' lu'ing ni', kinuba' nici ke' na Itaṟal ga ungat sunngala' hiyan ka ci'uli' alang. minoh ngawa' ni' ka ke' ga bale' matatu'uy kora'. mananang caṟung ka linlungan sababa' ni' ci ke' na Itaṟal.
S.PHON: pas~ɕariŋ ʦ~ʨu βaʔ lunluŋ nanuʔ ʦ~ʨu matul iŋkaɾalan ɣaleŋ niʔ, iniʔ min ħaɾi pakakuβaʔ ʦ~ʨi mamaʔ mu watan. jeka, nel tunux mu ɣa, mamaʔ (watan) ħijaʔ ɣa iniʔ laiŋ ʦ~ʨi keʔ as~ɕ us~ɕaʔ la ŋawaʔ niʔ lu mas~ɕaŋ ʦ~ʨaɾuŋ uɾi. je pas~ɕariŋ kanon iniʔ mu βaʔij, wal min jona mas~ɕuleʔ ʦ~ʨi mamaʔ la. s~ɕunkis~ɕliʔ ʦ~ʨaɾuŋ ʦ~ʨi ins~ɕaʔ na itaɾal ka mamaʔ mu. jona kelan tutux na ʦ~ʨiʔuliʔ jujuk pakiʔ luʔiŋ niʔ, kinuβaʔ niʦ~ʨi keʔ na itaɾal ɣa uŋat s~ɕunŋalaʔ ħijan ka ʦ~ʨiʔuliʔ alaŋ. minoħ ŋawaʔ niʔ ka keʔ ɣa βaleʔ matatuʔuj koraʔ. mananaŋ ʦ~ʨaɾuŋ ka linluŋan s~ɕaβaβaʔ niʔ ʦ~ʨi keʔ na itaɾal.
S.FORM: pasaring cu ba' lunlung nanu' cu matul ingkaṟalan galeng ni', ini' min haṟi pakakuba' ci mama' mu Watan. yeka, nel tunux mu ga, mama' (Watan) hiya' ga ini' laing ci ke' as usa' la ngawa' ni' lu masang caṟung uṟi. ye pasaring kanon ini' mu ba'iy, wal min yona masule' ci mama' la. sunkisli' caṟung ci insa' na Itaṟal ka mama' mu. yona kelan tutux na ci'uli' yuyuk paki' lu'ing ni', kinuba' nici ke' na Itaṟal ga ungat sunngala' hiyan ka ci'uli' alang. minoh ngawa' ni' ka ke' ga bale' matatu'uy kora'. mananang caṟung ka linlungan sababa' ni' ci ke' na Itaṟal.
S.PHON: pas~ɕariŋ ʦ~ʨu βaʔ lunluŋ nanuʔ ʦ~ʨu matul iŋkaɾalan ɣaleŋ niʔ, iniʔ min ħaɾi pakakuβaʔ ʦ~ʨi mamaʔ mu watan. jeka, nel tunux mu ɣa, mamaʔ (watan) ħijaʔ ɣa iniʔ laiŋ ʦ~ʨi keʔ as~ɕ us~ɕaʔ la ŋawaʔ niʔ lu mas~ɕaŋ ʦ~ʨaɾuŋ uɾi. je pas~ɕariŋ kanon iniʔ mu βaʔij, wal min jona mas~ɕuleʔ ʦ~ʨi mamaʔ la. s~ɕunkis~ɕliʔ ʦ~ʨaɾuŋ ʦ~ʨi ins~ɕaʔ na itaɾal ka mamaʔ mu. jona kelan tutux na ʦ~ʨiʔuliʔ jujuk pakiʔ luʔiŋ niʔ, kinuβaʔ niʦ~ʨi keʔ na itaɾal ɣa uŋat s~ɕunŋalaʔ ħijan ka ʦ~ʨiʔuliʔ alaŋ. minoħ ŋawaʔ niʔ ka keʔ ɣa βaleʔ matatuʔuj koraʔ. mananaŋ ʦ~ʨaɾuŋ ka linluŋan s~ɕaβaβaʔ niʔ ʦ~ʨi keʔ na itaɾal.
S.TRANSL: 從我懂事一直到30歲以前，我跟舅舅（Watan Nawi）幾乎沒什麼交集。因為，在我的印象裡，舅舅是個有話直說又愛生氣的人，不記得從什麼時候開始，我跟舅舅的感情就像父女一樣，舅舅對母語文化的傳承是全心全意的投入，他腦子裡就像住了一個精靈一樣，他對族語的理解與認識， 是我和部落的族人所不及的，只要是從他口裏說的族語即是出口成章，對於母語他有自己的堅持與執著。舅舅有感於萬大語沒有自己的母語聖詩。和擔任國小校長的古秋鳳表姐專研萬大聖詩的翻譯工程，就是希望能用自已的母語來歌頌、讚美主，也完成了近百首。

S.FORM: lunlung ka mama' (Watan) ga, ungat la ke' taka awas na kiyokay ma, kani ka magluw sunbale' ci awas na kiyokay laha' ci absuṟan mu cel musinsi' gako'. hita ta' ming nak ci ke' na patas ta' mawas tirahu' Yaban Bawi' ma. patehuk haṟi' utux kabhul patas ka sinbale'an naha'. sasable' nici ke' na itaṟal ka mama' (Watan) ga ungat ka pasangala'. mayanux ci kaca ga, galun ci sinsi' pacacapung ci ke' na Itaṟal naka sincungyen yencumincu weywenhwey, lu musinsi' na gako', payux ka awas na Itaṟ sinbale' ni uṟi. taxan karirex tunayuw alang, maras ci rajyo malahang ci nabkis sunli' ci ke' na Plngawan. yonani kinangṟat lumuhing ci ke' na Itaṟal ka hiya', lunlungun mu micuw ga, mama' (Watan) hiya' ga ungat payunaw ka kinuba' ni.
S.PHON: lunluŋ ka mamaʔ (watan) ɣa, uŋat la keʔ taka awas~ɕ na kijokaj ma, kani ka maɣluw s~ɕunβaleʔ ʦ~ʨi awas~ɕ na kijokaj laħaʔ ʦ~ʨi aβs~ɕuɾan mu ʦ~ʨel mus~ɕins~ɕiʔ ɣakoʔ. ħita taʔ miŋ nak ʦ~ʨi keʔ na patas~ɕ taʔ mawas~ɕ tiraħuʔ jaβan βawiʔ ma. pateħuk ħaɾiʔ utux kaβħul patas~ɕ ka s~ɕinβaleʔan naħaʔ. s~ɕas~ɕaβleʔ niʦ~ʨi keʔ na itaɾal ka mamaʔ (watan) ɣa uŋat ka pas~ɕaŋalaʔ. majanux ʦ~ʨi kaʦ~ʨa ɣa, ɣalun ʦ~ʨi s~ɕins~ɕiʔ paʦ~ʨaʦ~ʨapuŋ ʦ~ʨi keʔ na itaɾal naka s~ɕinʦ~ʨuŋjen jenʦ~ʨuminʦ~ʨu wejwenħwej, lu mus~ɕins~ɕiʔ na ɣakoʔ, pajux ka awas~ɕ na itaɾ s~ɕinβaleʔ ni uɾi. taxan karirex tunajuw alaŋ, maras~ɕ ʦ~ʨi rajjo malaħaŋ ʦ~ʨi naβkis~ɕ s~ɕunliʔ ʦ~ʨi keʔ na plŋawan. jonani kinaŋɾat lumuħiŋ ʦ~ʨi keʔ na itaɾal ka ħijaʔ, lunluŋun mu miʦ~ʨuw ɣa, mamaʔ (watan) ħijaʔ ɣa uŋat pajunaw ka kinuβaʔ ni.
S.FORM: lunlung ka mama' (Watan) ga, ungat la ke' taka awas na kiyokay ma, kani ka magluw sunbale' ci awas na kiyokay laha' ci absuṟan mu cel musinsi' gako'. hita ta' ming nak ci ke' na patas ta' mawas tirahu' Yaban Bawi' ma. patehuk haṟi' utux kabhul patas ka sinbale'an naha'. sasable' nici ke' na itaṟal ka mama' (Watan) ga ungat ka pasangala'. mayanux ci kaca ga, galun ci sinsi' pacacapung ci ke' na Itaṟal naka sincungyen yencumincu weywenhwey, lu musinsi' na gako', payux ka awas na Itaṟ sinbale' ni uṟi. taxan karirex tunayuw alang, maras ci rajyo malahang ci nabkis sunli' ci ke' na Plngawan. yonani kinangṟat lumuhing ci ke' na Itaṟal ka hiya', lunlungun mu micuw ga, mama' (Watan) hiya' ga ungat payunaw ka kinuba' ni.
S.PHON: lunluŋ ka mamaʔ (watan) ɣa, uŋat la keʔ taka awas~ɕ na kijokaj ma, kani ka maɣluw s~ɕunβaleʔ ʦ~ʨi awas~ɕ na kijokaj laħaʔ ʦ~ʨi aβs~ɕuɾan mu ʦ~ʨel mus~ɕins~ɕiʔ ɣakoʔ. ħita taʔ miŋ nak ʦ~ʨi keʔ na patas~ɕ taʔ mawas~ɕ tiraħuʔ jaβan βawiʔ ma. pateħuk ħaɾiʔ utux kaβħul patas~ɕ ka s~ɕinβaleʔan naħaʔ. s~ɕas~ɕaβleʔ niʦ~ʨi keʔ na itaɾal ka mamaʔ (watan) ɣa uŋat ka pas~ɕaŋalaʔ. majanux ʦ~ʨi kaʦ~ʨa ɣa, ɣalun ʦ~ʨi s~ɕins~ɕiʔ paʦ~ʨaʦ~ʨapuŋ ʦ~ʨi keʔ na itaɾal naka s~ɕinʦ~ʨuŋjen jenʦ~ʨuminʦ~ʨu wejwenħwej, lu mus~ɕins~ɕiʔ na ɣakoʔ, pajux ka awas~ɕ na itaɾ s~ɕinβaleʔ ni uɾi. taxan karirex tunajuw alaŋ, maras~ɕ ʦ~ʨi rajjo malaħaŋ ʦ~ʨi naβkis~ɕ s~ɕunliʔ ʦ~ʨi keʔ na plŋawan. jonani kinaŋɾat lumuħiŋ ʦ~ʨi keʔ na itaɾal ka ħijaʔ, lunluŋun mu miʦ~ʨuw ɣa, mamaʔ (watan) ħijaʔ ɣa uŋat pajunaw ka kinuβaʔ ni.
S.TRANSL: 舅舅族語翻譯的功力無人能及，生前曾擔任行政院原住民委員會萬大母語認證的命題、口試委員、母語老師、並用母語創作了好些歌讓大家唱，在部落裡也常常看到他帶著工具（錄音機）找年紀比他大的來收集語料。對於一個對自己文化的傳承是這樣的認同與認真的人，現在回想起來，我不得不承認舅舅是一個不可取代的一塊寶。

S.FORM: ini' kabuse', utux ka rangi' mu minoh tanux ba' ma'abu' ci aguw. minsa' tunayuw matisal ututux alang laga, yona maskitu' ka raṟes ni' kumaṟal kinang; "pagluw ta' malax ci aguw la!", kuba' nak, moka alang insalan ni' ga tanaguw caṟung kora', maku masaṟux ci insa' ni'.
S.PHON: iniʔ kaβus~ɕeʔ, utux ka raŋiʔ mu minoħ tanux βaʔ maʔaβuʔ ʦ~ʨi aɣuw. mins~ɕaʔ tunajuw matis~ɕal ututux alaŋ laɣa, jona mas~ɕkituʔ ka raɾes~ɕ niʔ kumaɾal kinaŋ; "paɣluw taʔ malax ʦ~ʨi aɣuw la!", kuβaʔ nak, moka alaŋ ins~ɕalan niʔ ɣa tanaɣuw ʦ~ʨaɾuŋ koraʔ, maku mas~ɕaɾux ʦ~ʨi ins~ɕaʔ niʔ.
S.FORM: ini' kabuse', utux ka rangi' mu minoh tanux ba' ma'abu' ci aguw. minsa' tunayuw matisal ututux alang laga, yona maskitu' ka raṟes ni' kumaṟal kinang; "pagluw ta' malax ci aguw la!", kuba' nak, moka alang insalan ni' ga tanaguw caṟung kora', maku masaṟux ci insa' ni'.
S.PHON: iniʔ kaβus~ɕeʔ, utux ka raŋiʔ mu minoħ tanux βaʔ maʔaβuʔ ʦ~ʨi aɣuw. mins~ɕaʔ tunajuw matis~ɕal ututux alaŋ laɣa, jona mas~ɕkituʔ ka raɾes~ɕ niʔ kumaɾal kinaŋ; "paɣluw taʔ malax ʦ~ʨi aɣuw la!", kuβaʔ nak, moka alaŋ ins~ɕalan niʔ ɣa tanaɣuw ʦ~ʨaɾuŋ koraʔ, maku mas~ɕaɾux ʦ~ʨi ins~ɕaʔ niʔ.
S.TRANSL: 前不久，一位酒量不錯的外國友人，在拜訪幾個山地部落之後，神精淒然嚴肅地告訴我說：＂我們一起戒酒吧！＂，原來，那幾處山地部落酗酒的嚴重現象，引起他很深的罪惡感。

S.FORM: "kumaṟal ka hiya'; ma'abu' ta caṟung laga, pakapuṟut kora' ka alang tala." kani ka ke' ni'. sumoṟal cu, ba'un mu ka linlungan ni' uṟi, alang na Itaṟal, minlu' wal ungat ka mumaṟah naha, gagaṟux lu sinbaba'an naha laga, mintana' cika ci'uli' Tayawniso matakuṟ na kinmasnukan, wal yona pakapuṟut ka paki' tunux mu masinhayuw sababale' ma'abu' i turu' na mumaṟah ka rali' hiya'.
S.PHON: "kumaɾal ka ħijaʔ; maʔaβuʔ ta ʦ~ʨaɾuŋ laɣa, pakapuɾut koraʔ ka alaŋ tala." kani ka keʔ niʔ. s~ɕumoɾal ʦ~ʨu, βaʔun mu ka linluŋan niʔ uɾi, alaŋ na itaɾal, minluʔ wal uŋat ka mumaɾaħ naħa, ɣaɣaɾux lu s~ɕinβaβaʔan naħa laɣa, mintanaʔ ʦ~ʨika ʦ~ʨiʔuliʔ tajawnis~ɕo matakuɾ na kinmas~ɕnukan, wal jona pakapuɾut ka pakiʔ tunux mu mas~ɕinħajuw s~ɕaβaβaleʔ maʔaβuʔ i turuʔ na mumaɾaħ ka raliʔ ħijaʔ.
S.FORM: "kumaṟal ka hiya'; ma'abu' ta caṟung laga, pakapuṟut kora' ka alang tala." kani ka ke' ni'. sumoṟal cu, ba'un mu ka linlungan ni' uṟi, alang na Itaṟal, minlu' wal ungat ka mumaṟah naha, gagaṟux lu sinbaba'an naha laga, mintana' cika ci'uli' Tayawniso matakuṟ na kinmasnukan, wal yona pakapuṟut ka paki' tunux mu masinhayuw sababale' ma'abu' i turu' na mumaṟah ka rali' hiya'.
S.PHON: "kumaɾal ka ħijaʔ; maʔaβuʔ ta ʦ~ʨaɾuŋ laɣa, pakapuɾut koraʔ ka alaŋ tala." kani ka keʔ niʔ. s~ɕumoɾal ʦ~ʨu, βaʔun mu ka linluŋan niʔ uɾi, alaŋ na itaɾal, minluʔ wal uŋat ka mumaɾaħ naħa, ɣaɣaɾux lu s~ɕinβaβaʔan naħa laɣa, mintanaʔ ʦ~ʨika ʦ~ʨiʔuliʔ tajawnis~ɕo matakuɾ na kinmas~ɕnukan, wal jona pakapuɾut ka pakiʔ tunux mu mas~ɕinħajuw s~ɕaβaβaleʔ maʔaβuʔ i turuʔ na mumaɾaħ ka raliʔ ħijaʔ.
S.TRANSL: ＂再喝下去，原住民將消滅自己的部落。＂他說。我同意也同情他的感受，山地社會在失去了它的田園、藝術和宗教之後，戴奧尼索斯墮落的狂醉形式，的確正在腐蝕我童年記憶中田園飲酒的美麗圖像。

S.FORM: micuw, taxan mu ga, tanaguw caṟung ka alang na Itaṟal la. minmahmut lu mahahubu ka insa', ga, aṟat sun "malax ci aguw" laga, maha matabale' ka insa' na Itaṟal la. kani ga linlungan mu ga; ye ta' anak "buse' minutux masnukan", mati'uṟit roṟi' ka bu' na roṟi…
S.PHON: miʦ~ʨuw, taxan mu ɣa, tanaɣuw ʦ~ʨaɾuŋ ka alaŋ na itaɾal la. minmaħmut lu maħaħuβu ka ins~ɕaʔ, ɣa, aɾat s~ɕun "malax ʦ~ʨi aɣuw" laɣa, maħa mataβaleʔ ka ins~ɕaʔ na itaɾal la. kani ɣa linluŋan mu ɣa; je taʔ anak "βus~ɕeʔ minutux mas~ɕnukan", matiʔuɾit roɾiʔ ka βuʔ na roɾi*
S.FORM: micuw, taxan mu ga, tanaguw caṟung ka alang na Itaṟal la. minmahmut lu mahahubu ka insa', ga, aṟat sun "malax ci aguw" laga, maha matabale' ka insa' na Itaṟal la. kani ga linlungan mu ga; ye ta' anak "buse' minutux masnukan", mati'uṟit roṟi' ka bu' na roṟi…
S.PHON: miʦ~ʨuw, taxan mu ɣa, tanaɣuw ʦ~ʨaɾuŋ ka alaŋ na itaɾal la. minmaħmut lu maħaħuβu ka ins~ɕaʔ, ɣa, aɾat s~ɕun "malax ʦ~ʨi aɣuw" laɣa, maħa mataβaleʔ ka ins~ɕaʔ na itaɾal la. kani ɣa linluŋan mu ɣa; je taʔ anak "βus~ɕeʔ minutux mas~ɕnukan", matiʔuɾit roɾiʔ ka βuʔ na roɾi*
S.TRANSL: 不過，基於上述我對酒神的理解，我仍然相信山地酗酒的現象，有它複雜、深刻的因素，不是＂戒酒＂一端便可以解決的。我因此建議：也許我們可以＂久久酒一次＂吧，淚水不禁在眼眶中徘徊…。

S.FORM: Yaba' min cel maki' kaṟal, ki' min mululi' ci ralu' su'. sinbale'an na alang su', pantu'iy min ci kakinuxan, yona inki' su' kaṟal bawi'. nani'un min ga, beniy caminan kira'.
S.PHON: jaβaʔ min ʦ~ʨel makiʔ kaɾal, kiʔ min mululiʔ ʦ~ʨi raluʔ s~ɕuʔ. s~ɕinβaleʔan na alaŋ s~ɕuʔ, pantuʔij min ʦ~ʨi kakinuxan, jona inkiʔ s~ɕuʔ kaɾal βawiʔ. naniʔun min ɣa, βenij ʦ~ʨaminan kiraʔ.
S.FORM: Yaba' min cel maki' kaṟal, ki' min mululi' ci ralu' su'. sinbale'an na alang su', pantu'iy min ci kakinuxan, yona inki' su' kaṟal bawi'. nani'un min ga, beniy caminan kira'.
S.PHON: jaβaʔ min ʦ~ʨel makiʔ kaɾal, kiʔ min mululiʔ ʦ~ʨi raluʔ s~ɕuʔ. s~ɕinβaleʔan na alaŋ s~ɕuʔ, pantuʔij min ʦ~ʨi kakinuxan, jona inkiʔ s~ɕuʔ kaɾal βawiʔ. naniʔun min ɣa, βenij ʦ~ʨaminan kiraʔ.
S.TRANSL: 我們在天上的父、願人都尊祢的名為聖。願祢的國降臨。願祢的旨意行在地上、如同行在天上。我們日用的飲食、今日賜給我們。

S.FORM: suṟaliy ka alu'ing min, yona sinuṟalan min ci ci'uli'. iya' min paktaxi ci kaṟakexan, hulu'iy min minoh pakṟa'ilan. yaka alang, sinrahu', tirahu', sinang kora' ana nanu' kanon. ameng
S.PHON: s~ɕuɾalij ka aluʔiŋ min, jona s~ɕinuɾalan min ʦ~ʨi ʦ~ʨiʔuliʔ. ijaʔ min paktaxi ʦ~ʨi kaɾakexan, ħuluʔij min minoħ pakɾaʔilan. jaka alaŋ, s~ɕinraħuʔ, tiraħuʔ, s~ɕinaŋ koraʔ ana nanuʔ kanon. ameŋ

S.TRANSL: 免我們的債、如同我們免了人的債。不叫我們遇見試探，救我們脫離兇惡。因為國度、權柄、榮耀、全是你的直到永遠、阿們。

S.FORM: inuw teung ramas taxan lukus ni',
S.PHON: inuw teuŋ ramas~ɕ taxan lukus~ɕ niʔ,
S.FORM: inuw teung ramas taxan lukus ni',

S.TRANSL: 野地的花穿著美麗的衣裳，

S.FORM: ini' lunglung ci pisco' cuxan kabahni',
S.PHON: iniʔ luŋluŋ ʦ~ʨi pis~ɕʦ~ʨoʔ ʦ~ʨuxan kaβaħniʔ,

S.TRANSL: 天空的鳥兒從來不為生活忙，
親愛的天父，天天都看顧，

S.FORM: umalu' ci'uli', hiyan ka tu'uy na mayanux.
S.PHON: umaluʔ ʦ~ʨiʔuliʔ, ħijan ka tuʔuj na majanux.

S.TRANSL: 祂更愛世上人，為他們預備永生的路。

S.PHON: amol ka kis~ɕliʔ taʔ βaʔun niʔ jaβaʔ koraʔ,

S.PHON: amol ka kis~ɕliʔ taʔ βaʔun niʔ jaβaʔ koraʔ,
S.TRANSL: 一切需要天父已經都知道，

S.PHON: paklaħβun taʔ ɣa βaʔun ni malax koraʔ,

S.TRANSL: 若心中煩惱讓祂為你除掉，

S.FORM: Yaba' kaṟal ga matox karirex, ungat ini' ni' ba'iy,
S.PHON: jaβaʔ kaɾal ɣa matox karirex, uŋat iniʔ niʔ βaʔij,
S.FORM: Yaba' kaṟal ga matox karirex, ungat ini' ni' ba'iy,
S.PHON: jaβaʔ kaɾal ɣa matox karirex, uŋat iniʔ niʔ βaʔij,
S.TRANSL: 慈愛的天父，天天都看顧，
祂是全能的主，信靠祂的人真是有福。

S.FORM: tuhya' na alang Taywan ka kisli' mu caṟung kelan, hapṟow cu cikaca ga minki' cu sani', kora' ka sunkakaru' na insa' mu ga nel sani' kora' uṟi. sunkisli' cu suntuhya' sakawiy cika ragex ni, matox ci ṟuṟuk ṟahalang na gong, tupanga' asu' bawi' na wacilung.
S.PHON: tuħjaʔ na alaŋ tajwan ka kis~ɕliʔ mu ʦ~ʨaɾuŋ kelan, ħapɾow ʦ~ʨu ʦ~ʨikaʦ~ʨa ɣa minkiʔ ʦ~ʨu s~ɕaniʔ, koraʔ ka s~ɕunkakaruʔ na ins~ɕaʔ mu ɣa nel s~ɕaniʔ koraʔ uɾi. s~ɕunkis~ɕliʔ ʦ~ʨu s~ɕuntuħjaʔ s~ɕakawij ʦ~ʨika raɣex ni, matox ʦ~ʨi ɾuɾuk ɾaħalaŋ na ɣoŋ, tupaŋaʔ as~ɕuʔ βawiʔ na waʦ~ʨiluŋ.
S.FORM: tuhya' na alang Taywan ka kisli' mu caṟung kelan, hapṟow cu cikaca ga minki' cu sani', kora' ka sunkakaru' na insa' mu ga nel sani' kora' uṟi. sunkisli' cu suntuhya' sakawiy cika ragex ni, matox ci ṟuṟuk ṟahalang na gong, tupanga' asu' bawi' na wacilung.

S.TRANSL: 遙遠的台灣是我所喜愛的地方。最好的歲月是在該島上消磨的，我的生活也集中於該處。我喜歡仰望它的巍峨的山峰，俯視它的深廣的溪壑，泛舟於它的波濤洶湧的溪流。

S.FORM: kisli' mu ka cici'uli kalux la hi' ki, Pamukan, Kahabu' lu Itaṟal. mapusal ingkaṟalan piskakayan mu ki', gumaṟang cu ci ke' ni Yesu.
S.PHON: kis~ɕliʔ mu ka ʦ~ʨiʦ~ʨiʔuli kalux la ħiʔ ki, pamukan, kaħaβuʔ lu itaɾal. mapus~ɕal iŋkaɾalan pis~ɕkakajan mu kiʔ, ɣumaɾaŋ ʦ~ʨu ʦ~ʨi keʔ ni jes~ɕu.
S.FORM: kisli' mu ka cici'uli kalux la hi' ki, Pamukan, Kahabu' lu Itaṟal. mapusal ingkaṟalan piskakayan mu ki', gumaṟang cu ci ke' ni Yesu.
S.PHON: kis~ɕliʔ mu ka ʦ~ʨiʦ~ʨiʔuli kalux la ħiʔ ki, pamukan, kaħaβuʔ lu itaɾal. mapus~ɕal iŋkaɾalan pis~ɕkakajan mu kiʔ, ɣumaɾaŋ ʦ~ʨu ʦ~ʨi keʔ ni jes~ɕu.
S.TRANSL: 我喜愛它黑皮膚的人民平埔和生番，在他們中間走了20年，宣傳耶穌的福音。

S.FORM: umihul cu papasba' ci ke' ni Yaba Bawi' lahan, ye cu wal min malapṟow kabhul haṟi' lunglung, anak cu mahuil ci insa' mu mikung, moka patas pinatas mu hani ini' lapgiy na cici'uli' ci kaca naga, pukura' cu babang alang luṟi', pistu'uy ni Yaba Bawi'. mamaha' cu cika tagacak wacilung Taypingyang alang Taywan, paki' cu Taywan nanu masputing ka kinuxan mu. su'un mu mumaṟah ka pumahun ni Yaba Bawi' laga, paki' cu cika syaw hinṟang na wacilung, pabel cu cika bale' sunṟabi' na totah ṟik ki'.
S.PHON: umiħul ʦ~ʨu papas~ɕβaʔ ʦ~ʨi keʔ ni jaβa βawiʔ laħan, je ʦ~ʨu wal min malapɾow kaβħul ħaɾiʔ luŋluŋ, anak ʦ~ʨu maħuil ʦ~ʨi ins~ɕaʔ mu mikuŋ, moka patas~ɕ pinatas~ɕ mu ħani iniʔ lapɣij na ʦ~ʨiʦ~ʨiʔuliʔ ʦ~ʨi kaʦ~ʨa naɣa, pukuraʔ ʦ~ʨu βaβaŋ alaŋ luɾiʔ, pis~ɕtuʔuj ni jaβa βawiʔ. mamaħaʔ ʦ~ʨu ʦ~ʨika taɣaʦ~ʨak waʦ~ʨiluŋ tajpiŋjaŋ alaŋ tajwan, pakiʔ ʦ~ʨu tajwan nanu mas~ɕputiŋ ka kinuxan mu. s~ɕuʔun mu mumaɾaħ ka pumaħun ni jaβa βawiʔ laɣa, pakiʔ ʦ~ʨu ʦ~ʨika s~ɕjaw ħinɾaŋ na waʦ~ʨiluŋ, paβel ʦ~ʨu ʦ~ʨika βaleʔ s~ɕunɾaβiʔ na totaħ ɾik kiʔ.

S.TRANSL: 為了要以福音教導他們，我不止一千次，情願犧牲我的生命。在我所寫的文章為人閱讀以前，我將再往遠東，蒙上帝的指導，再到太平洋那邊我所愛的臺灣之家。我希望在那裡消磨我的餘年，我為主服務的時日完了之後，我將在臺灣的海浪之聲所及之處，在搖擺的竹蔭下得一永眠之所。
兩隻老虎 兩隻老虎

S.FORM: pagilasuw ga ki naha kalahngan lu babali'un sungku' ka gagaṟux na Itaṟal, rumuruw rumow pasba' maginbiniy ci pipinmuhi' lu paci' tutux ci sababa'an hahalan sunbaba' na ci'uli'.
S.PHON: paɣilas~ɕuw ɣa ki naħa kalaħŋan lu βaβaliʔun s~ɕuŋkuʔ ka ɣaɣaɾux na itaɾal, rumuruw rumow pas~ɕβaʔ maɣinβinij ʦ~ʨi pipinmuħiʔ lu paʦ~ʨiʔ tutux ʦ~ʨi s~ɕaβaβaʔan ħaħalan s~ɕunβaβaʔ na ʦ~ʨiʔuliʔ.
S.FORM: pagilasuw ga ki naha kalahngan lu babali'un sungku' ka gagaṟux na Itaṟal, rumuruw rumow pasba' maginbiniy ci pipinmuhi' lu paci' tutux ci sababa'an hahalan sunbaba' na ci'uli'.

S.TRANSL: 政府應保存與維護原住民族文化，並輔導文化產業及培育人才。

S.FORM: pagilasuw hiya ga, ki sumoṟal ci insa' na Itaral, sipanoh ci linlungan nak na Itaṟal, tiralon ci ralu' sinbili' na kinnabkisan rali' ka alang lu nanahi'.

S.PHON: paɣilas~ɕuw ħija ɣa, ki s~ɕumoɾal ʦ~ʨi ins~ɕaʔ na itaral, s~ɕipanoħ ʦ~ʨi linluŋan nak na itaɾal, tiralon ʦ~ʨi raluʔ s~ɕinβiliʔ na kinnaβkis~ɕan raliʔ ka alaŋ lu nanaħiʔ.
S.TRANSL: 政府於原住民地區，應依原住族意願回復原住民族部落及山川傳統名稱。

S.FORM: cel tutux ka nabkis nabkis na ci'uli', maṟaṟawa' ka roṟi' ni', asuw ka cange' uṟi, mabilbil kora' ka tari' ni'. mani' ci mami' ga sunṟahu' ci sari' karirex, mama' marus rakat nane'an ka ṟagu', macuy minoh ngawa' ka aṟingu' uṟi. kararyuhun matox na ina' lu ule' ni', maku' magiy tuling bukuy na ṟahka' ka nabkis haca. buten naha' mi' tutux ci ṟating, pagigan pusa' ki' kora' ka mami' lu raramat, ututux nane'an ga, ini' naha' sipatangi' pake' ka nabkis hani', mangihuṟ la kisli' ka nabkis hani, matiuṟit roṟi' ṟik karirex ka bu' na roṟi' matox rakat nane'an.
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨel tutux ka naβkis~ɕ naβkis~ɕ na ʦ~ʨiʔuliʔ, maɾaɾawaʔ ka roɾiʔ niʔ, as~ɕuw ka ʦ~ʨaŋeʔ uɾi, maβilβil koraʔ ka tariʔ niʔ. maniʔ ʦ~ʨi mamiʔ ɣa s~ɕunɾaħuʔ ʦ~ʨi s~ɕariʔ karirex, mamaʔ marus~ɕ rakat naneʔan ka ɾaɣuʔ, maʦ~ʨuj minoħ ŋawaʔ ka aɾiŋuʔ uɾi. kararjuħun matox na inaʔ lu uleʔ niʔ, makuʔ maɣij tuliŋ βukuj na ɾaħkaʔ ka naβkis~ɕ ħaʦ~ʨa. βuten naħaʔ miʔ tutux ʦ~ʨi ɾatiŋ, paɣiɣan pus~ɕaʔ kiʔ koraʔ ka mamiʔ lu raramat, ututux naneʔan ɣa, iniʔ naħaʔ s~ɕipataŋiʔ pakeʔ ka naβkis~ɕ ħaniʔ, maŋiħuɾ la kis~ɕliʔ ka naβkis~ɕ ħani, matiuɾit roɾiʔ ɾik karirex ka βuʔ na roɾiʔ matox rakat naneʔan.
S.FORM: cel tutux ka nabkis nabkis na ci'uli', maṟaṟawa' ka roṟi' ni', asuw ka cange' uṟi, mabilbil kora' ka tari' ni'. mani' ci mami' ga sunṟahu' ci sari' karirex, mama' marus rakat nane'an ka ṟagu', macuy minoh ngawa' ka aṟingu' uṟi. kararyuhun matox na ina' lu ule' ni', maku' magiy tuling bukuy na ṟahka' ka nabkis haca. buten naha' mi' tutux ci ṟating, pagigan pusa' ki' kora' ka mami' lu raramat, ututux nane'an ga, ini' naha' sipatangi' pake' ka nabkis hani', mangihuṟ la kisli' ka nabkis hani, matiuṟit roṟi' ṟik karirex ka bu' na roṟi' matox rakat nane'an.
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨel tutux ka naβkis~ɕ naβkis~ɕ na ʦ~ʨiʔuliʔ, maɾaɾawaʔ ka roɾiʔ niʔ, as~ɕuw ka ʦ~ʨaŋeʔ uɾi, maβilβil koraʔ ka tariʔ niʔ. maniʔ ʦ~ʨi mamiʔ ɣa s~ɕunɾaħuʔ ʦ~ʨi s~ɕariʔ karirex, mamaʔ marus~ɕ rakat naneʔan ka ɾaɣuʔ, maʦ~ʨuj minoħ ŋawaʔ ka aɾiŋuʔ uɾi. kararjuħun matox na inaʔ lu uleʔ niʔ, makuʔ maɣij tuliŋ βukuj na ɾaħkaʔ ka naβkis~ɕ ħaʦ~ʨa. βuten naħaʔ miʔ tutux ʦ~ʨi ɾatiŋ, paɣiɣan pus~ɕaʔ kiʔ koraʔ ka mamiʔ lu raramat, ututux naneʔan ɣa, iniʔ naħaʔ s~ɕipataŋiʔ pakeʔ ka naβkis~ɕ ħaniʔ, maŋiħuɾ la kis~ɕliʔ ka naβkis~ɕ ħani, matiuɾit roɾiʔ ɾik karirex ka βuʔ na roɾiʔ matox rakat naneʔan.
S.TRANSL: 從前有個很老很老的老人，眼睛花，耳朵也背，雙膝還不住地發抖。每當他坐在餐桌前吃飯時，湯匙也握不穩，常常把菜湯灑在桌布上，湯還會從嘴邊流出來，兒子和媳婦都嫌棄他，老人只好躲到灶後的角落裡吃飯 。他們給他一只瓦盆，把飯菜盛到裡面給他吃，而且每頓飯都不給老人吃飽。老人很傷心，常常眼淚汪汪地看這桌子。

S.FORM: utux rex, malalu' ka aba' na nabkis maku' sunṟahu' ming ci ṟating, wal mastuw raxal lu mabka' ka ṟating la. matox ka ina' niga, ini' alax pasaṟit hiyan, ini' bah sasangawa' ka nabkis hani, kintatu' paskisli'. sibiniy naha' tikiy ci bilak na pila' binnanaran ci sinbale' na kahuni' ka ṟating sibi' cika nabkis.
S.PHON: utux rex, malaluʔ ka aβaʔ na naβkis~ɕ makuʔ s~ɕunɾaħuʔ miŋ ʦ~ʨi ɾatiŋ, wal mas~ɕtuw raxal lu maβkaʔ ka ɾatiŋ la. matox ka inaʔ niɣa, iniʔ alax pas~ɕaɾit ħijan, iniʔ βaħ s~ɕas~ɕaŋawaʔ ka naβkis~ɕ ħani, kintatuʔ pas~ɕkis~ɕliʔ. s~ɕiβinij naħaʔ tikij ʦ~ʨi βilak na pilaʔ βinnanaran ʦ~ʨi s~ɕinβaleʔ na kaħuniʔ ka ɾatiŋ s~ɕiβiʔ ʦ~ʨika naβkis~ɕ.
S.FORM: utux rex, malalu' ka aba' na nabkis maku' sunṟahu' ming ci ṟating, wal mastuw raxal lu mabka' ka ṟating la. matox ka ina' niga, ini' alax pasaṟit hiyan, ini' bah sasangawa' ka nabkis hani, kintatu' paskisli'. sibiniy naha' tikiy ci bilak na pila' binnanaran ci sinbale' na kahuni' ka ṟating sibi' cika nabkis.
S.PHON: utux rex, malaluʔ ka aβaʔ na naβkis~ɕ makuʔ s~ɕunɾaħuʔ miŋ ʦ~ʨi ɾatiŋ, wal mas~ɕtuw raxal lu maβkaʔ ka ɾatiŋ la. matox ka inaʔ niɣa, iniʔ alax pas~ɕaɾit ħijan, iniʔ βaħ s~ɕas~ɕaŋawaʔ ka naβkis~ɕ ħani, kintatuʔ pas~ɕkis~ɕliʔ. s~ɕiβinij naħaʔ tikij ʦ~ʨi βilak na pilaʔ βinnanaran ʦ~ʨi s~ɕinβaleʔ na kaħuniʔ ka ɾatiŋ s~ɕiβiʔ ʦ~ʨika naβkis~ɕ.
S.TRANSL: 有一天，老人的手顫抖得連那只瓦盆都端不穩了，瓦盆掉到地上打碎了。兒媳沒完沒了地訓斥他，老人一聲不吭，只是不住地嘆氣。他們於是花了幾分錢買來一只木碗給老人吃飯用。

S.FORM: inu' tutux rex luṟi', magluw matatama' mani' ka ina' lu ule' naka nabkis, moka mago' ni paṟat ingkaṟalan ga, bali'un ni magal ka kakahuni' minki' raxal pasasilen ni'. "amol su' kani'" maka yaba' ni. cumik ka mago' maha "pasbale' cu ci kahuni' na ṟating, yotas cu laga, babi' mu cimunan, babingun mamu mani' ci mami'." sun ni' ka yaba' ni'. masu' mung ci ke' hani ka yaba' laga, makakatox ci kanel ni', mangilis la. as nahaṟi' malawa' ci ka nabkis patataman naha' cika rakat nane'an. pasaring ki' laga magluw mani' lahan karirex ka nabkis la, ana macuy ka anamol minoh ngawa' lu aba' ga, ini' bah kumaṟal ka laha' haca la.
S.PHON: inuʔ tutux rex luɾiʔ, maɣluw matatamaʔ maniʔ ka inaʔ lu uleʔ naka naβkis~ɕ, moka maɣoʔ ni paɾat iŋkaɾalan ɣa, βaliʔun ni maɣal ka kakaħuniʔ minkiʔ raxal pas~ɕas~ɕilen niʔ. "amol s~ɕuʔ kaniʔ" maka jaβaʔ ni. ʦ~ʨumik ka maɣoʔ maħa "pas~ɕβaleʔ ʦ~ʨu ʦ~ʨi kaħuniʔ na ɾatiŋ, jotas~ɕ ʦ~ʨu laɣa, βaβiʔ mu ʦ~ʨimunan, βaβiŋun mamu maniʔ ʦ~ʨi mamiʔ." s~ɕun niʔ ka jaβaʔ niʔ. mas~ɕuʔ muŋ ʦ~ʨi keʔ ħani ka jaβaʔ laɣa, makakatox ʦ~ʨi kanel niʔ, maŋilis~ɕ la. as~ɕ naħaɾiʔ malawaʔ ʦ~ʨi ka naβkis~ɕ patataman naħaʔ ʦ~ʨika rakat naneʔan. pas~ɕariŋ kiʔ laɣa maɣluw maniʔ laħan karirex ka naβkis~ɕ la, ana maʦ~ʨuj ka anamol minoħ ŋawaʔ lu aβaʔ ɣa, iniʔ βaħ kumaɾal ka laħaʔ ħaʦ~ʨa la.
S.FORM: inu' tutux rex luṟi', magluw matatama' mani' ka ina' lu ule' naka nabkis, moka mago' ni paṟat ingkaṟalan ga, bali'un ni magal ka kakahuni' minki' raxal pasasilen ni'. "amol su' kani'" maka yaba' ni. cumik ka mago' maha "pasbale' cu ci kahuni' na ṟating, yotas cu laga, babi' mu cimunan, babingun mamu mani' ci mami'." sun ni' ka yaba' ni'. masu' mung ci ke' hani ka yaba' laga, makakatox ci kanel ni', mangilis la. as nahaṟi' malawa' ci ka nabkis patataman naha' cika rakat nane'an. pasaring ki' laga magluw mani' lahan karirex ka nabkis la, ana macuy ka anamol minoh ngawa' lu aba' ga, ini' bah kumaṟal ka laha' haca la.
S.PHON: inuʔ tutux rex luɾiʔ, maɣluw matatamaʔ maniʔ ka inaʔ lu uleʔ naka naβkis~ɕ, moka maɣoʔ ni paɾat iŋkaɾalan ɣa, βaliʔun ni maɣal ka kakaħuniʔ minkiʔ raxal pas~ɕas~ɕilen niʔ. "amol s~ɕuʔ kaniʔ" maka jaβaʔ ni. ʦ~ʨumik ka maɣoʔ maħa "pas~ɕβaleʔ ʦ~ʨu ʦ~ʨi kaħuniʔ na ɾatiŋ, jotas~ɕ ʦ~ʨu laɣa, βaβiʔ mu ʦ~ʨimunan, βaβiŋun mamu maniʔ ʦ~ʨi mamiʔ." s~ɕun niʔ ka jaβaʔ niʔ. mas~ɕuʔ muŋ ʦ~ʨi keʔ ħani ka jaβaʔ laɣa, makakatox ʦ~ʨi kanel niʔ, maŋilis~ɕ la. as~ɕ naħaɾiʔ malawaʔ ʦ~ʨi ka naβkis~ɕ patataman naħaʔ ʦ~ʨika rakat naneʔan. pas~ɕariŋ kiʔ laɣa maɣluw maniʔ laħan karirex ka naβkis~ɕ la, ana maʦ~ʨuj ka anamol minoħ ŋawaʔ lu aβaʔ ɣa, iniʔ βaħ kumaɾal ka laħaʔ ħaʦ~ʨa la.
S.TRANSL: 後來有一天，老人的兒子和媳婦正坐在那兒吃飯，四歲的小孫子在把地上的碎木片拾掇到一起。＂你這是在做什麼呢?＂父親問。＂我要做一只木碗，等我長大了，讓爸爸媽媽用它吃飯。＂聽到這話，兒子和媳婦對視了一會兒，最後哭了起來。他們立刻將老人請到桌邊，讓他從此和他們一起吃飯，即使老人潑了點什麼，他們也不再說什麼了。

S.FORM: ba'un su': suna'as ci kisli' ka sun masrangi' hiya', hoga maskisli' ta' laga tinggit ta' mahahiri' ci linlungan uṟi.
S.PHON: βaʔun s~ɕuʔ: s~ɕunaʔas~ɕ ʦ~ʨi kis~ɕliʔ ka s~ɕun mas~ɕraŋiʔ ħijaʔ, ħoɣa mas~ɕkis~ɕliʔ taʔ laɣa tiŋɣit taʔ maħaħiriʔ ʦ~ʨi linluŋan uɾi.
S.FORM: ba'un su': suna'as ci kisli' ka sun masrangi' hiya', hoga maskisli' ta' laga tinggit ta' mahahiri' ci linlungan uṟi.
S.PHON: βaʔun s~ɕuʔ: s~ɕunaʔas~ɕ ʦ~ʨi kis~ɕliʔ ka s~ɕun mas~ɕraŋiʔ ħijaʔ, ħoɣa mas~ɕkis~ɕliʔ taʔ laɣa tiŋɣit taʔ maħaħiriʔ ʦ~ʨi linluŋan uɾi.
S.TRANSL: 你知道：友誼總是帶給人們歡欣愉快，而愛情卻常常使人憂悶苦惱。

S.FORM: minlu' mararili' ka sun katana'an lu makakatox ga, ini' sintariy na ci'uli', suṟalun naha ci insa'. " katana'an na!" picaca kumaṟal ka ci'uli'. hoga nabkis hiya' laga as ka ini' mahmut sunkisli' ci kankanel lu malikuṟ, ini' naha' suṟali' ci insa' ka nabkis hiya' la.
S.PHON: minluʔ marariliʔ ka s~ɕun katanaʔan lu makakatox ɣa, iniʔ s~ɕintarij na ʦ~ʨiʔuliʔ, s~ɕuɾalun naħa ʦ~ʨi ins~ɕaʔ. " katanaʔan na!" piʦ~ʨaʦ~ʨa kumaɾal ka ʦ~ʨiʔuliʔ. ħoɣa naβkis~ɕ ħijaʔ laɣa as~ɕ ka iniʔ maħmut s~ɕunkis~ɕliʔ ʦ~ʨi kankanel lu malikuɾ, iniʔ naħaʔ s~ɕuɾaliʔ ʦ~ʨi ins~ɕaʔ ka naβkis~ɕ ħijaʔ la.

S.TRANSL: 假如年輕人互相愛戀、產生情欲，人們見到後並不責怪，而予原諒，會說：＂還年輕吶！＂但是老人決不可輕易生癡動情。人們是不會諒解老年人的。

S.FORM: linlungan na ci'uli' hiya' ga, ini' naha' haṟi' pakaṟaliy lu pasaṟiciy ka ungat la ralu', taxan naha' ci insa' lu gilason naha' ka absuṟan hiya'. kani ka muabsuṟan lu nabkis hiya' ga, as ka matox haṟi' ci insa' lu ini' mahmut lunglung lunglung. muṟaṟing ka absuṟan na utux alang hiya'; as ka ini' mahmut maṟaṟawa' ka roṟi' kuṟak ci kanel na alang.
S.PHON: linluŋan na ʦ~ʨiʔuliʔ ħijaʔ ɣa, iniʔ naħaʔ ħaɾiʔ pakaɾalij lu pas~ɕaɾiʦ~ʨij ka uŋat la raluʔ, taxan naħaʔ ʦ~ʨi ins~ɕaʔ lu ɣilas~ɕon naħaʔ ka aβs~ɕuɾan ħijaʔ. kani ka muaβs~ɕuɾan lu naβkis~ɕ ħijaʔ ɣa, as~ɕ ka matox ħaɾiʔ ʦ~ʨi ins~ɕaʔ lu iniʔ maħmut luŋluŋ luŋluŋ. muɾaɾiŋ ka aβs~ɕuɾan na utux alaŋ ħijaʔ; as~ɕ ka iniʔ maħmut maɾaɾawaʔ ka roɾiʔ kuɾak ʦ~ʨi kanel na alaŋ.

S.TRANSL: 人們往往責俗者寬，責聖者嚴。因此作為帝王或長者，萬不可生此邪念。更不待說年邁的國王了—絕不能覬覦民女，貪婪秀色。

S.FORM: Cingay kosyaw ga cel maki' tuhya' haṟi' na nanahi' yuyuk na gako'. sinsi' lu seyto' ga wal haṟi' utux kabhul maspat mapgan, pilaw ingkaṟalan hani' ga maha' malapṟow sa'ing ingkaṟalan ka pincungus lalapgan na ule' ka pagilasuw.
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨiŋaj kos~ɕjaw ɣa ʦ~ʨel makiʔ tuħjaʔ ħaɾiʔ na nanaħiʔ jujuk na ɣakoʔ. s~ɕins~ɕiʔ lu s~ɕejtoʔ ɣa wal ħaɾiʔ utux kaβħul mas~ɕpat mapɣan, pilaw iŋkaɾalan ħaniʔ ɣa maħaʔ malapɾow s~ɕaʔiŋ iŋkaɾalan ka pinʦ~ʨuŋus~ɕ lalapɣan na uleʔ ka paɣilas~ɕuw.

S.TRANSL: 南投縣仁愛鄉親愛國小是一個地處偏遠的小學校，全校教職員工、學生合計約180人上下。近年12年國教正確的引領，

S.FORM: kani' ga, masutux ci linlungan ka sinsi' lu yaya' yaba' na ule' alang, malahang ci a'usa' na ule' hita' mulu' ci kisli' naha' sababa'an ma. sinsi' gako' ga ba' ci sunkisli' mawas, palubuw, matas ka ule' na Itaṟal.
S.PHON: kaniʔ ɣa, mas~ɕutux ʦ~ʨi linluŋan ka s~ɕins~ɕiʔ lu jajaʔ jaβaʔ na uleʔ alaŋ, malaħaŋ ʦ~ʨi aʔus~ɕaʔ na uleʔ ħitaʔ muluʔ ʦ~ʨi kis~ɕliʔ naħaʔ s~ɕaβaβaʔan ma. s~ɕins~ɕiʔ ɣakoʔ ɣa βaʔ ʦ~ʨi s~ɕunkis~ɕliʔ mawas~ɕ, paluβuw, matas~ɕ ka uleʔ na itaɾal.
S.FORM: kani' ga, masutux ci linlungan ka sinsi' lu yaya' yaba' na ule' alang, malahang ci a'usa' na ule' hita' mulu' ci kisli' naha' sababa'an ma. sinsi' gako' ga ba' ci sunkisli' mawas, palubuw, matas ka ule' na Itaṟal.
S.PHON: kaniʔ ɣa, mas~ɕutux ʦ~ʨi linluŋan ka s~ɕins~ɕiʔ lu jajaʔ jaβaʔ na uleʔ alaŋ, malaħaŋ ʦ~ʨi aʔus~ɕaʔ na uleʔ ħitaʔ muluʔ ʦ~ʨi kis~ɕliʔ naħaʔ s~ɕaβaβaʔan ma. s~ɕins~ɕiʔ ɣakoʔ ɣa βaʔ ʦ~ʨi s~ɕunkis~ɕliʔ mawas~ɕ, paluβuw, matas~ɕ ka uleʔ na itaɾal.
S.TRANSL: 師生和家長都有一個共識，適性揚才，讓每一個孩子都能夠發現自己的興趣，做自己喜歡的事情 ，學校老師了解原住民的孩子對藝術與人文有天分，也就是對於唱歌、彈琴、雕刻、畫畫等都有一定的興趣，

S.FORM: kani' ga mahukil malahang ci parow, habaṟaw ka cici'uli moh matox lu rumow lahan la. pahngagan rex ini' bah mahnguw ka sinsi' pasba' ci ulule' gako', hapṟow nak sunbaba' ka ule' uṟi. musa' mawas lu palubuw tanux, paktox ci sinbaba'an naha'. patiuṟit ci ṟaṟulu' maras ci seyto' ka sinsi', ana' a'abelan, nani'un, sinsi' kora' ka pagilasuw. yonani' suntikuk tikiy ci pila' sisable' naha' ci lubuw lu angaya' na gako' ka ulule' gako'. pa'asun caṟung ka rinow na yencumincu weyyenxuey lu ci'uli' alang uṟi.
S.PHON: kaniʔ ɣa maħukil malaħaŋ ʦ~ʨi parow, ħaβaɾaw ka ʦ~ʨiʦ~ʨiʔuli moħ matox lu rumow laħan la. paħŋaɣan rex iniʔ βaħ maħŋuw ka s~ɕins~ɕiʔ pas~ɕβaʔ ʦ~ʨi ululeʔ ɣakoʔ, ħapɾow nak s~ɕunβaβaʔ ka uleʔ uɾi. mus~ɕaʔ mawas~ɕ lu paluβuw tanux, paktox ʦ~ʨi s~ɕinβaβaʔan naħaʔ. patiuɾit ʦ~ʨi ɾaɾuluʔ maras~ɕ ʦ~ʨi s~ɕejtoʔ ka s~ɕins~ɕiʔ, anaʔ aʔaβelan, naniʔun, s~ɕins~ɕiʔ koraʔ ka paɣilas~ɕuw. jonaniʔ s~ɕuntikuk tikij ʦ~ʨi pilaʔ s~ɕis~ɕaβleʔ naħaʔ ʦ~ʨi luβuw lu aŋajaʔ na ɣakoʔ ka ululeʔ ɣakoʔ. paʔas~ɕun ʦ~ʨaɾuŋ ka rinow na jenʦ~ʨuminʦ~ʨu wejjenxuej lu ʦ~ʨiʔuliʔ alaŋ uɾi.

S.TRANSL: 學校老師便積極尋找資源，尋找同好，基於那麼多的人參與和關心，學校老師更是利用假日、晚上的時間加強培訓，孩子也很爭氣，很用心，參與民間團體的表演活動，爭取很多表演的機會，學校老師隨時跟著開車，照顧他們的生活起居，賺一些表演費來貼補維修的材料，學校的設備維修等，也是她們自己掙來的，當然也要特別謝謝原住民族委員會於學校和社區的幫忙。

S.FORM: nel musinsi' alang ka sinsi' ga, ini' haṟi' pasaṟigal gako' babang uṟi. ana' ungat ka rex naha' musa' tumong sunbaba' ci sinbaba'an, ini' susebeh ci babinaran uṟi. hoga, kora' ka sinsi' ga palapgan naha' nanahi' ka ule' naha' nak uṟi. pagigan naha' ci ule' na Itaṟal, tarahri' matox ci raragex alang.
S.PHON: nel mus~ɕins~ɕiʔ alaŋ ka s~ɕins~ɕiʔ ɣa, iniʔ ħaɾiʔ pas~ɕaɾiɣal ɣakoʔ βaβaŋ uɾi. anaʔ uŋat ka rex naħaʔ mus~ɕaʔ tumoŋ s~ɕunβaβaʔ ʦ~ʨi s~ɕinβaβaʔan, iniʔ s~ɕus~ɕeβeħ ʦ~ʨi βaβinaran uɾi. ħoɣa, koraʔ ka s~ɕins~ɕiʔ ɣa palapɣan naħaʔ nanaħiʔ ka uleʔ naħaʔ nak uɾi. paɣiɣan naħaʔ ʦ~ʨi uleʔ na itaɾal, taraħriʔ matox ʦ~ʨi raraɣex alaŋ.
S.FORM: nel musinsi' alang ka sinsi' ga, ini' haṟi' pasaṟigal gako' babang uṟi. ana' ungat ka rex naha' musa' tumong sunbaba' ci sinbaba'an, ini' susebeh ci babinaran uṟi. hoga, kora' ka sinsi' ga palapgan naha' nanahi' ka ule' naha' nak uṟi. pagigan naha' ci ule' na Itaṟal, tarahri' matox ci raragex alang.
S.PHON: nel mus~ɕins~ɕiʔ alaŋ ka s~ɕins~ɕiʔ ɣa, iniʔ ħaɾiʔ pas~ɕaɾiɣal ɣakoʔ βaβaŋ uɾi. anaʔ uŋat ka rex naħaʔ mus~ɕaʔ tumoŋ s~ɕunβaβaʔ ʦ~ʨi s~ɕinβaβaʔan, iniʔ s~ɕus~ɕeβeħ ʦ~ʨi βaβinaran uɾi. ħoɣa, koraʔ ka s~ɕins~ɕiʔ ɣa palapɣan naħaʔ nanaħiʔ ka uleʔ naħaʔ nak uɾi. paɣiɣan naħaʔ ʦ~ʨi uleʔ na itaɾal, taraħriʔ matox ʦ~ʨi raraɣex alaŋ.
S.TRANSL: 在部落任教的老師，異動很少，雖然沒有進修機會，生活上也不方便，但是各個老師都寧願把自己的孩子留在本校讀書，讓他們也接觸原住民的孩子，享受大自然的生態，

S.FORM: ruma' nak sinsi' ga miniy ci yotas na ṟaṟulu', papasatu' naha' ci ulule' musa' sunbaba' palubuw, maṟuy, lu sunbaba' ci ke' na alang babang. sisulung naha' ci ule' naha' matox ka ule' na Itaṟal, minoh linlungan ma'as cika sinsi' ka ci'uli' alang. sinsi' laha' ci ule' naha' ga, hita' sababale' lu ma'as inki' naha' alang Cingay uṟi.

S.TRANSL: 有的老師還自掏腰包買中型巴士，接送孩子 學琴、學舞蹈、學英文，真的把這些孩子當自己的孩子，社區家長對於親愛國小的老師打從心裡的感激，希望老師和老師的孩子在親愛部落也過得非常幸福，非常快樂。

S.PHON: βaʔun s~ɕuʔ koraʔ ka tintuliʔ mu lu ʦ~ʨinraɣan mu, βaʔun s~ɕuʔ pas~ɕariŋ tuħjaʔ ka linluŋan mu uɾi.
S.FORM: ba'un su' kora' ka tintuli' mu lu cinragan mu, ba'un su' pasaring tuhya' ka linlungan mu uṟi.
S.PHON: βaʔun s~ɕuʔ koraʔ ka tintuliʔ mu lu ʦ~ʨinraɣan mu, βaʔun s~ɕuʔ pas~ɕariŋ tuħjaʔ ka linluŋan mu uɾi.
S.TRANSL: 我坐下、我起來、你都曉得，你從遠處知道我的意念。

S.FORM: taxan su' ka pinkakayan lu inbelan mu; ba'un su' kora' ka nel mu wahan.
S.PHON: taxan s~ɕuʔ ka pinkakajan lu inβelan mu; βaʔun s~ɕuʔ koraʔ ka nel mu waħan.
S.FORM: taxan su' ka pinkakayan lu inbelan mu; ba'un su' kora' ka nel mu wahan.
S.PHON: taxan s~ɕuʔ ka pinkakajan lu inβelan mu; βaʔun s~ɕuʔ koraʔ ka nel mu waħan.
S.TRANSL: 我行路、我躺臥你都細察、你也深知我一切所行的。

S.FORM: kora' ka kinuba' hani ga aṟat cu pakuba'. aṟat mu tatehkan ka kinṟaṟihung na kinuba' su' uṟi.
S.PHON: koraʔ ka kinuβaʔ ħani ɣa aɾat ʦ~ʨu pakuβaʔ. aɾat mu tateħkan ka kinɾaɾiħuŋ na kinuβaʔ s~ɕuʔ uɾi.
S.FORM: kora' ka kinuba' hani ga aṟat cu pakuba'. aṟat mu tatehkan ka kinṟaṟihung na kinuba' su' uṟi.
S.PHON: koraʔ ka kinuβaʔ ħani ɣa aɾat ʦ~ʨu pakuβaʔ. aɾat mu tateħkan ka kinɾaɾiħuŋ na kinuβaʔ s~ɕuʔ uɾi.
S.TRANSL: 這樣的知識奇妙、是我不能淵的，至高、是我不能及的。
當我受特殊試煉和痛苦時候，

S.FORM: tana' bingun inalu' mu mi Yesu,
S.PHON: tanaʔ βiŋun inaluʔ mu mi jes~ɕu,
S.FORM: tana' bingun inalu' mu mi Yesu,
S.PHON: tanaʔ βiŋun inaluʔ mu mi jes~ɕu,
S.TRANSL: 主耶穌就告訴我恩典夠用。
每當我灰心失望完全無助的時候，
主耶穌就告訴我恩典夠用，

S.FORM: tana' bingun inalu' mu mi Yesu.
S.PHON: tanaʔ βiŋun inaluʔ mu mi jes~ɕu.
S.FORM: tana' bingun inalu' mu mi Yesu.
S.PHON: tanaʔ βiŋun inaluʔ mu mi jes~ɕu.

S.FORM: maki' lahbun ka ke' ni', rumuruw na seyrey,
S.PHON: makiʔ laħβun ka keʔ niʔ, rumuruw na s~ɕejrej,
S.FORM: maki' lahbun ka ke' ni', rumuruw na seyrey,
S.PHON: makiʔ laħβun ka keʔ niʔ, rumuruw na s~ɕejrej,

S.TRANSL: 在百般試煉中當大喜樂，

S.FORM: inalu' mu mi Yesu cubay kani'.
S.PHON: inaluʔ mu mi jes~ɕu ʦ~ʨuβaj kaniʔ.
S.FORM: inalu' mu mi Yesu cubay kani'.
S.PHON: inaluʔ mu mi jes~ɕu ʦ~ʨuβaj kaniʔ.
S.TRANSL: 只要信祂的恩典是夠我用。

S.FORM: pinsugayan ta' Makcagis babuw ni' la ga, no' mu sun ka kisli' yonani kinmangihuṟ, sipa'aya' puing na kahuni' ka lubuw, ungat su' moh, no' mu sun nak malubuw. muti' cu matatama' ci ka ungat babanglit na malahngan. paskisli' cu, hala su' cel lunglung nak tuhya' mi kung, hala su' pakbuse' haṟi' inohan su' mi kung.
S.PHON: pins~ɕuɣajan taʔ makʦ~ʨaɣis~ɕ βaβuw niʔ la ɣa, noʔ mu s~ɕun ka kis~ɕliʔ jonani kinmaŋiħuɾ, s~ɕipaʔajaʔ puiŋ na kaħuniʔ ka luβuw, uŋat s~ɕuʔ moħ, noʔ mu s~ɕun nak maluβuw. mutiʔ ʦ~ʨu matatamaʔ ʦ~ʨi ka uŋat βaβaŋlit na malaħŋan. pas~ɕkis~ɕliʔ ʦ~ʨu, ħala s~ɕuʔ ʦ~ʨel luŋluŋ nak tuħjaʔ mi kuŋ, ħala s~ɕuʔ pakβus~ɕeʔ ħaɾiʔ inoħan s~ɕuʔ mi kuŋ.
S.FORM: pinsugayan ta' Makcagis babuw ni' la ga, no' mu sun ka kisli' yonani kinmangihuṟ, sipa'aya' puing na kahuni' ka lubuw, ungat su' moh, no' mu sun nak malubuw. muti' cu matatama' ci ka ungat babanglit na malahngan. paskisli' cu, hala su' cel lunglung nak tuhya' mi kung, hala su' pakbuse' haṟi' inohan su' mi kung.
S.PHON: pins~ɕuɣajan taʔ makʦ~ʨaɣis~ɕ βaβuw niʔ la ɣa, noʔ mu s~ɕun ka kis~ɕliʔ jonani kinmaŋiħuɾ, s~ɕipaʔajaʔ puiŋ na kaħuniʔ ka luβuw, uŋat s~ɕuʔ moħ, noʔ mu s~ɕun nak maluβuw. mutiʔ ʦ~ʨu matatamaʔ ʦ~ʨi ka uŋat βaβaŋlit na malaħŋan. pas~ɕkis~ɕliʔ ʦ~ʨu, ħala s~ɕuʔ ʦ~ʨel luŋluŋ nak tuħjaʔ mi kuŋ, ħala s~ɕuʔ pakβus~ɕeʔ ħaɾiʔ inoħan s~ɕuʔ mi kuŋ.
S.TRANSL: 自Mkcagis分開後，我就一直無法平復難過的心，我把口簧琴掛在樹頭上，你不在時我要如何來吹奏口簧琴？在一個寂寞的夜裡獨自坐著，我深深嘆息，也許你在遠方也正在想，也許你還有一段時間才回來？
